Couples can enjoy award-winning estate wines and create unforgettable memories in this serene wine country location.

name: Groveland Hotel
description: Warm, rustic-chic rooms & suites in a historic boutique hotel featuring a relaxed restaurant/bar.

name: Eve's Waterfront
description: Eve's Waterfront is a stunning waterfront restaurant wedding venue in Oakland, California, offering panoramic ocean views and an expansive deck for ceremonies. It features various indoor banquet rooms with elegant designs, accommodating up to 400 seated guests for receptions. The venue provides a nautical style and is ideal for laid-back wedding celebrations with options for full buyouts.

name: Cass Winery
description: CASS Winery in Paso Robles is a destination vineyard wedding venue offering epic views, a modern aesthetic, and celebrations among the vines since 2002. They provide various packages that include catering, stays, and options for transforming weddings into weekend getaways for quality time with guests. Couples can host ceremonies under a gorgeous oak tree in the vineyard and receptions in stylish indoor spaces like the barrel room.

name: Friendly Hills Country Club
description: Full-service country club with a scenic 18-hole golf course, plus a pool, tennis & social events.

name: Stanly Ranch, Auberge Collection
description: Stanly Ranch, Auberge Collection in Napa Valley offers weddings amidst Wine Country's splendor, with venues like the Glasshouse Barn featuring panoramic vineyard views and spaces for up to 450 guests. The resort provides a personalized approach to event planning, including custom ranch-inspired menus and coordination by a dedicated team. Its blend of modern design and rustic charm makes it ideal for intimate yet special celebrations rooted in nature.

name: JaM Cellars
description: JaM Cellars Ballroom in Napa, CA, is available for private events like receptions and can accommodate 50 to 600 guests, offering a full restaurant, bar, and catering services in the historic Napa Valley Opera House. The venue also includes The Mansion, a restored 1892 estate with indoor rooms and outdoor spaces such as a firepit and bocce court, ideal for wedding celebrations. As part of a winery, it combines wine experiences with event hosting for a unique atmosphere.

name: Oakland Scottish Rite Center
description: The Oakland Scottish Rite Center is a historic wedding venue in Oakland, CA, built in 1927 with Italian Renaissance detailing, offering elegant indoor spaces like the Merritt Ballroom for up to 600 guests and the Kirkpatrick Auditorium for mid-sized events. It provides options for ceremonies, receptions, and micro-weddings, with professional event staff assisting in planning and setup. Overlooking Lake Merritt, it ensures a timeless and sophisticated backdrop for special occasions.

name: The Madrona
description: Plush lodging in a Second Empire manor with an outdoor pool, an acclaimed restaurant & a chic bar.

name: Riverside Art Museum
description: The Riverside Art Museum in Riverside, CA, designed by architect Julia Morgan, features historic spaces like a garden-like atrium and a shaded rooftop courtyard ideal for weddings and receptions. Couples can exchange vows in the atrium or galleries and celebrate with up to 150 guests, enjoying the ambiance of art-filled environments that support the museum's community mission. The venue offers both indoor and outdoor options with customizable packages for events.

name: Sierra 2 Center for the Arts and Community
description: Sierra 2 Center for the Arts and Community in Sacramento, CA, offers versatile spaces like Curtis Hall and the Garden Room for weddings, featuring garden patios, banquet areas, and historical settings with capacities up to 150 indoors and 100 outdoors. They provide affordable rates, all-day rentals, and assistance with event planning, making it suitable for ceremonies, receptions, and showers. The venue is open seven days a week with easy access and free parking.

name: Mar'sel
description: Elegant resort restaurant presenting New American cuisine in an elegant space with ocean views.

name: Hotel Dena, Pasadena Los Angeles, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel
description: Chic quarters in an upscale hotel with a cocktail bar, a cafe & an outdoor pool, plus event space.

name: The Elderberry House
description: Luxurious, fairy-tale setting featuring a French-Californian set-price dinner menu & Sunday brunch.

name: Porter Valley Country Club
description: Porter Valley Country Club in Northridge, CA, offers elegant outdoor wedding ceremonies in a rose garden or on the first tee with panoramic views of the San Fernando foothills and a lake, complemented by newly remodeled indoor reception spaces like The Sunset at Porter Valley for up to 300 guests. The venue provides all-inclusive wedding packages with professional staff handling details, making it ideal for seamless celebrations. It's surrounded by lush landscapes and features modern amenities for a picturesque and accommodating event.

name: Madonna Estate Winery
description: Longtime family-operated winery, founded in 1922, offering a tasting room & 2 picnic areas.

name: San Vicente Resort
description: Warm rooms in a relaxed hotel offering a golf course, 2 restaurants & a bar, plus an outdoor pool.

name: Arte Américas
description: Arte Américas in downtown Fresno, CA, serves as a versatile wedding venue with spacious indoor galleries (18,000 square feet) and a large outdoor plaza (20,000 square feet), ideal for ceremonies and receptions; it has hosted weddings, offering a cultural hub with multicultural programming that adds a unique artistic flair to events; the venue provides options for both intimate and large gatherings, with features like shaded areas and event support as evidenced by a real wedding documented there.

name: The Grand 1401
description: The Grand 1401 is a premier wedding venue in downtown Fresno, featuring historic charm and modern elegance in its Grand Ballroom and rooftop ballroom, The Grand on 10. It offers versatile spaces for ceremonies, receptions, and other events, accommodating up to 550 guests with amenities like dressing rooms and on-site coordination. Couples appreciate its spacious indoor areas, stunning views, and exceptional service for creating personalized wedding experiences.

name: The Restaurant at Hotel Bel-Air
description: The Restaurant at Hotel Bel-Air provides an intimate private dining room for small wedding events, accommodating up to 18 guests and featuring a sophisticated space with a towering glass-encased wine cellar and bespoke banquet services. As part of the luxurious Hotel Bel-Air, it offers access to the hotel's idyllic garden settings and curated menus with fresh regional ingredients for wedding celebrations. This space is ideal for private, romantic occasions within the larger hotel property.

name: O'Brien Estate Winery
description: 40-acre family-run winery offering reservation-only tours & tastings with scenic vineyard views.

name: Brass Bear Funk Zone
description: Located half a block from the beach in Santa Barbara's Funk Zone, Brass Bear Brewing & Bistro offers a cozy beer garden that accommodates up to 200 guests for weddings, featuring locally sourced menu items and high-quality craft beers brewed in collaboration with Rincon Brewery. The venue is ideal for celebrations like wedding receptions and rehearsals, with its outdoor space providing a casual urban vibe near downtown and the ocean. Couples can enjoy personalized events with on-site catering and beverage services to bring their vision to life.

name: Vintage House at The Estate Yountville

name: Circle Bar B Guest Ranch & Stables, Lodging and Events

name: Fairmont Breakers Long Beach

As a meticulously restored icon from the Roaring Twenties, it provides sophisticated amenities and breathtaking Pacific Ocean views for dream weddings. Guests can accommodate up to 175 for receptions in the largest space.

name: MountainGate Country Club

The venue features experienced event planners to curate bespoke weddings with customizable ambiance and stunning golf course backdrops. It is ideal for both ceremonies and receptions, blending timeless traditions with modern luxury.

name: Concannon Vineyard
description: From smaller, intimate gatherings to large-scale celebrations, each space is supported by award-winning wines, thoughtful service, and a team experienced in bringing events together with ease. We’re here to help you create an experience your guests will truly enjoy. Contact Us Event Spaces Bubbles Lounge Perfect for baby showers, bridal celebrations, and smaller intimate events, the Bubbles Lounge offers direct access to an open-air vineyard patio set beside rows of Pinot Noir vines grown for our Blanc de Noir sparkling wine.

name: Domenico Winery
description: Winery for handcrafted varietals, plus a tasting room with a mahogany bar & an old-world vibe.

name: Villa De Amore Temecula Wedding Venue
description: Villa De Amore is a premier wedding venue in Temecula's wine country, offering stunning vineyard views and all-inclusive packages that include flowers, photography, catering, and decor for a stress-free experience. The venue features picturesque outdoor spaces like gardens and vineyards for ceremonies, as well as elegant indoor ballrooms for receptions, with attentive staff providing personalized services. Guests consistently praise its breathtaking scenery, professional coordination, and magical atmosphere that makes every wedding feel unique and memorable.

name: MacCallum House Inn
description: Refined accommodations & Californian fine dining in an elegant setting with ocean views.

name: Conrad Prebys Aztec Student Union
description: The Conrad Prebys Aztec Student Union at San Diego State University offers versatile indoor and outdoor spaces suitable for wedding ceremonies and receptions, including conference rooms, Montezuma Hall, and courtyards. It provides on-site catering and event services through Union Programming and Services to ensure successful events. As a community center on campus, it combines modern facilities with scenic San Diego surroundings for memorable weddings.

name: Jonathan Club
description: Jonathan Club is a historic private social club in downtown Los Angeles, established over a century ago, offering elegant indoor spaces like the main dining room and ballroom for weddings with sophisticated architecture and moody ambiance. It features a rooftop for outdoor ceremonies with breathtaking city skyline views, making it ideal for upscale, high-energy events. Couples appreciate its exclusivity and storied history, which add a touch of timeless glamour to their celebrations.

name: Garré Vineyard, Restaurant, & Event Center

Italian/Mediterranean cuisine, wood-fired pizza, full bar. Dietary options: gluten-free, vegan, vegetarian. 29+ years in business.

name: Elite Event Venue
description: Elite Event Venue in Fresno, CA, offers modern wedding spaces with customizable options for indoor and outdoor settings, including courtyards and main halls, allowing couples to bring their own vendors or use preferred partners for a personalized experience. They provide wedding packages that include professional staff, linens, cakes, and suites for up to 150 guests, making it ideal for events from intimate gatherings to larger celebrations. The venue emphasizes creating unique, memorable weddings with features like LED lighting and ample parking.

name: The Club at Castlewood
description: The Club at Castlewood in Pleasanton, CA, is a historic estate offering weddings with ceremonies under majestic oak trees and receptions in an elegant ballroom overlooking the golf course. It provides spaces for up to 500 guests, including outdoor patios and indoor lounges, with 'day of' coordination to ensure a seamless celebration. The venue combines natural beauty and sophisticated amenities for a romantic and picturesque wedding experience.

name: The Glenmark, Glendale, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel

name: Victoria Club

name: The Steinbeck House Restaurant & Event Venue

name: Casa Vertigo – Event Venue in DTLA

It features elegant ballrooms, lounges, and customizable areas that can host events like engagement parties, rehearsals, and receptions. The venue's dynamic environments suit various wedding styles, from classic to modern, with high ceilings and gold details for a majestic atmosphere.

name: Villages Golf & Country Club
description: The Villages Golf & Country Club in San Jose, CA, offers picturesque wedding venues set amidst rolling hills and a championship golf course, providing stunning backdrops for ceremonies and receptions. The venue features multiple clubhouses with event spaces that can accommodate up to 300 guests, along with services like catering, bartending, and event staff for seamless celebrations. Its resort-like amenities, including outdoor areas and indoor facilities, make it ideal for couples seeking a blend of natural beauty and modern conveniences.

name: Longshadow Ranch Winery
description: Longshadow Ranch Winery in Temecula, CA, offers a rustic wedding ceremony and reception site surrounded by vineyards and shade trees, perfect for intimate celebrations with up to 200 guests. The venue features the Grand Lodge for indoor events and outdoor spaces like the Ceremony Lawn, providing a blend of natural beauty and modern amenities. It's designed for elegant country weddings with options for full services including setup, catering, and wine.

name: The Majestic Downtown

It offers full customization, allowing couples to bring their own vendors and transform the space from rustic to glamorous. This venue is ideal for those seeking a one-of-a-kind experience with its intricate details and flexibility for up to 200 guests.

name: SpringHill Suites by Marriott Los Angeles Downey
description: Relaxed all-suite hotel offering a restaurant & a breakfast buffet, plus a rooftop pool & a gym.

name: Taglyan Complex

Recognized by publications like The Knot, it's designed for unforgettable celebrations with customizable options for every aspect of the event.

name: Will Geer Theatricum Botanicum
description: Famous actor's legendary performing arts center & gardens highlighting classic theater & education.

name: El Cariso Golf Course

The venue also provides services like planning and catering to ensure a seamless event.

name: Holiday Inn Windsor - Wine Country by IHG

name: Aliso Viejo Country Club
description: Country club with an 18-hole, Jack Nicklaus golf course, large fitness center & a fusion restaurant.

name: SCP Mendocino Coast Lodge
description: Romantic inn with polished ocean-view rooms & cottages, plus a posh restaurant/bar.

name: Roblar Winery and Vineyards - Santa Ynez Estate Tasting Room
Presqu'ile Winery

Located in Encino, it provides affordable options for micro weddings with bilingual officiants and personalized services to make the day memorable. The chapel focuses on quick, seamless experiences for up to 30 guests, emphasizing romance and convenience in Los Angeles.

name: George Sim Community Center
description: The George Sim Community Center in Sacramento is a versatile event space that can accommodate weddings with its large event center holding up to 500 guests for banquets and theater-style setups, featuring amenities like an auditorium, stage, and warming kitchen. It offers both indoor multipurpose rooms and outdoor courtyard areas, making it ideal for ceremonies and receptions. This community center provides a practical and affordable option for couples seeking a spacious venue with recreational facilities nearby.

description: The Luckman Fine Arts Complex at Cal State LA offers versatile spaces like the Luckman Theatre and outdoor areas for events including receptions, with capacities up to 1,152 guests and on-site catering through Golden Eagle Hospitality. It features professional acoustics, lighting, and convenient parking, making it suitable for wedding ceremonies and receptions. The facility's highly-trained staff ensures a seamless experience for various events.

name: Libertine Brewing Company
description: Libertine Brewing Company in San Luis Obispo offers versatile event spaces suitable for weddings, featuring options from intimate rooms to larger areas accommodating up to 299 guests, with services to handle planning details. They provide both indoor and outdoor spaces for ceremonies and receptions, making it an all-inclusive venue for celebrations. The brewery atmosphere adds a unique touch for couples seeking a casual yet professional setting.

name: The Colonial Theatre
description: The Colonial Theatre in Sacramento is a historic entertainment venue that can be rented for events, including potential weddings, with a seating capacity of up to 572 guests in its main space. It features a stage with excellent acoustics, making it suitable for ceremonies and receptions, though specific wedding amenities are not detailed in the available information. As a performing arts center, it offers an intimate and versatile setting for various gatherings.

name: Same Day Marriage

They offer indoor spaces for intimate ceremonies and handle all county filings to ensure a seamless experience. This service is ideal for local, military, or international couples seeking a private, stress-free wedding without courthouse delays.

name: Sequoyah Country Club
description: Sequoyah Country Club in Oakland, CA, offers a timeless setting for weddings with sweeping views of the Oakland hills, elegant indoor spaces like the Terrace Room, and beautifully maintained outdoor areas for ceremonies and receptions. The venue accommodates up to 275 guests and provides customizable options including in-house catering, bar services, and event coordination to ensure a seamless celebration. Couples can tailor their events with various room layouts and styles, making it ideal for both intimate and grand weddings.

name: Kinfolx
description: Kinfolx is a POC-owned coffee shop and wine bar in downtown Oakland with three event spaces available for gatherings, making it a versatile venue for inclusive community events like weddings; it offers a welcoming atmosphere with in-house catering and beverage services, ideal for creating a home-like setting for ceremonies and receptions; the spaces, such as the Full Buyout and Living Room Gallery, can accommodate various event needs with a focus on comfort and community connection.

name: University Club of San Francisco
description: The University Club of San Francisco is a historic venue on Nob Hill offering panoramic views of the San Francisco skyline, perfect for weddings with its elegant event spaces that combine Victorian architecture and modern amenities. It hosts ceremonies and receptions in spaces like the library and dining rooms, accommodating up to 200 guests with included services such as a bridal suite, staffing, and setup. Couples praise its old-world charm, seamless indoor transitions, and exceptional hospitality for creating memorable wedding experiences.

name: Hotel E
description: Polished rooms with free Wi-Fi in a sophisticated hotel offering a courtyard & a lobby wine bar.

name: Alex Madonna Expo Center
description: The Alex Madonna Expo Center is a large indoor event space at the Madonna Inn in San Luis Obispo, CA, with over 20,000 square feet that can accommodate up to 2,600 guests, making it ideal for grand weddings and celebrations. It is part of the iconic Madonna Inn, offering access to on-site catering and event coordination for a seamless experience. This venue is frequently used for weddings, providing a spacious and versatile setting for various event needs.

name: Shakespeare Garden

It includes charming iron gates, pathways, and natural elements that create a private atmosphere, ideal for up to 200 guests. However, it is limited to ceremonies only, with no provisions for receptions or amplified sound.

name: El Camino Country Club

name: Golden Gate Club at The Presidio

It features multiple indoor ballrooms like the Ventana, Cypress, and Hawthorn rooms for receptions, as well as an outdoor courtyard and balcony perfect for ceremonies and cocktail hours. name: Smiley's Saloon, Hotel & Kitchen
description: Storied 1851 property with 6 understated, TV-free rooms, plus live music & karaoke.

name: Corinthian Grand Ballroom
description: The Corinthian Grand Ballroom is a historic Art Deco venue in San Jose, featuring hand-carved wood, soaring 60-foot ceilings, and marble accents, making it ideal for weddings with capacity for up to 850 guests. It offers amenities like a bridal suite, professional coordination, and stunning indoor spaces for ceremonies and receptions. The venue also includes outdoor areas for events, ensuring a memorable experience with exceptional service and catering options.

name: The Grape
description: The Grape Vines Wine Bar, located on 6.5 acres of open and wooded land in Ventura, CA, offers a versatile setting for weddings with aesthetic landscapes and various event spaces that provide a country escape feel combined with modern appeal. It caters to weddings, rehearsal dinners, bridal showers, and more, allowing for both intimate and larger gatherings across its grounds and wine bar. The venue emphasizes elegant backdrops for photography and can accommodate different event sizes, including the entire space.

name: Storrier Stearns Japanese Garden

name: Sunrise Banquet Hall and Event Center
Quail Hollow Ranch County Park
description: Scenic nature preserve on 300 acres with a visitors center organizing walks & educational programs.

name: Delta Hotels Santa Clara Silicon Valley
description: Understated rooms & suites in an informal hotel featuring a restaurant/bar, an outdoor pool & a gym.

name: The Heights Golf Club
description: Set among the rolling hills of the Rancho Bernardo Valley in San Diego, The Heights Golf Club offers picturesque indoor and outdoor spaces for weddings, including the Vista del Lago Ballroom and Lakeview Lawn with panoramic views of the lake and golf course. The venue caters to both intimate and extravagant celebrations, providing a devoted team to assist with every detail from engagement parties to receptions. Couples can enjoy a welcoming atmosphere with options for ceremonies and receptions that highlight the area's coastal breezes and scenic backdrops.

name: Stockton Memorial Civic Auditorium
description: The Stockton Memorial Civic Auditorium is a historic venue in downtown Stockton, California, available for private events including weddings, featuring 18,000 square feet of flexible indoor spaces like the Main Hall and stages for ceremonies and receptions. It offers amenities such as a full kitchen and options for up to 1,800 guests in its largest areas. Rentals can include catering and technical support for customized wedding events.

name: Michael's Tuscany Room
description: Michael's Tuscany Room is a romantic wedding and event venue located in San Pedro, CA, offering indoor spaces that can accommodate up to 250 seated guests with Tuscan-inspired decor and customizable packages. It provides in-house catering, ambiance lighting, and tables with chairs, making it ideal for ceremonies and receptions. Guests have praised its beautiful atmosphere and delicious food in reviews.

name: Khalsa Care Foundation
description: Khalsa Care Foundation is a Gurdwara in Pacoima, CA, that served as a venue for a Sikh Indian wedding, hosting ceremonies such as Kirtan and Vatna. It provides spaces for traditional cultural events, blending religious and community activities. The venue is known for its welcoming atmosphere for Sikh weddings in the Los Angeles area.

name: Cougar Vineyard and Winery
description: Cougar Vineyard and Winery in Temecula, CA, offers the Barrel Room and outdoor spaces for private events and celebrations, featuring Italian varietals, an on-site Osteria, and hillside views that create a romantic atmosphere ideal for weddings. The venue provides amenities like complimentary parking and can accommodate groups, making it suitable for special occasions with wine tastings and customized event handling. Inquiries for events can be sent to events@cougarvineyards.com for personalized arrangements.

name: ROUX
description: Charming bistro with a patio known for French & Mediterranean tapas, local ingredients & wine.

name: The Century
description: The Century is a full-service wedding and event venue located in the heart of downtown Modesto, California, featuring a historic ballroom with exposed brick walls, crystal chandeliers, and hand-scraped acacia hardwood floors. It offers comprehensive services including in-house catering, planning, coordination, and access to VIP suites for up to 250 guests. Couples can enjoy both indoor spaces and an outdoor patio, with everything from setup to cleanup handled by their expert team.

name: Terra Gallery & Event Venue
description: Terra Gallery & Event Venue in San Francisco is a versatile and elegant event space perfect for weddings, offering a spacious contemporary gallery with high ceilings, hardwood floors, and options for both indoor and outdoor ceremonies and receptions. It accommodates up to 725 guests for standing events and provides amenities like dressing rooms, wireless internet, and planning assistance to make your wedding day memorable. The venue's prime location in SOMA allows easy access to hotels and attractions, ideal for out-of-town guests.

name: The GlassHouse SJ
description: The GlassHouse SJ is a contemporary wedding venue in downtown San Jose, featuring 12,000 square feet of customizable space for up to 800 guests, including elegant interiors and an open-air patio ideal for ceremonies and receptions. It offers adaptable ambiance with options for intimate gatherings or grand celebrations, complemented by stylish features like wedding lounges and outdoor areas. Couples can enjoy all-inclusive packages that cover planning and setup for a stress-free experience.

name: The Ebell Club Long Beach
description: The Ebell Club Long Beach is a historic venue built in 1924 and recently renovated, offering elegant spaces like the Courtyard, Parlor, and Grand Ballroom for weddings and events. It can accommodate ceremonies, cocktail hours, and receptions for up to 210 seated guests, with exclusive catering provided by an award-winning team. The venue features a private bridal suite and professional amenities like a sound system and baby grand piano.

name: The Restaurant at Convict Lake
description: Romantic room with a high ceiling & wood floors offers Continental cuisine along with a martini bar.

name: The Terrace Room Events

It offers all-inclusive services including in-house catering, full bar, and event planning for occasions from intimate micro-weddings to larger celebrations, having won awards such as 'Best Wedding Venue' from the East Bay Express. The dedicated team ensures seamless execution, making it a sophisticated choice for couples seeking a blend of historic charm and modern elegance.

name: Mulberry Station Brewing Company
description: Mulberry Station Brewing Company in Chico, CA, offers a casual and vibrant event space ideal for weddings, featuring handcrafted beers, wood-fired pizzas, and live music options for a fun atmosphere. The venue provides indoor dining areas and is conveniently located for gatherings, making it suitable for couples seeking a relaxed, brewery-style celebration. It is listed on event platforms as a potential wedding venue, emphasizing its community-oriented appeal.

They provide beer and catering packages to accommodate events, making it a versatile option for celebrations. The venue features both indoor and outdoor settings with a focus on community and craft beer experiences.

name: Modesto Bingo Hall

It offers rental options or full-service customization to meet specific needs, including meals and snacks. The venue provides amenities like ample parking and is wheelchair accessible for guest convenience.

name: Corona Heritage Park & Museum
description: Park with vintage buildings, city heritage displays, gardens, an arts colony & event space.

name: Paloma Venice

It accommodates up to 500 guests and is suitable for social gatherings like engagement parties, offering a transported, market-fresh experience in a versatile setting.

name: Patron's Mexican Bar & Grill

name: Kirigin Cellars – Winery & Wine Tasting in Gilroy, California
description: Established in 1916 on 33 acres, this winery features vineyards, rose bushes, cricket lawns & more.

name: Sapphire Indian Cuisine
description: Sapphire Restaurant and Banquet in San Diego is a versatile event venue offering Indian cuisine, ideal for weddings with its banquet hall that accommodates various gatherings and provides in-house catering for customized menus. The venue features flexible indoor and outdoor spaces, making it suitable for ceremonies, receptions, and other events, with top-notch support for planning. Located at 16785 Bernardo Center Drive, it has been serving the community since 2002 and hosts special events like parties and community gatherings.

name: Metro Events

The venue allows for various themes like rustic, whimsical, romantic, or elegant, with options for outdoor photo sessions on the lawn or bayside. It provides ample space for events, ensuring a memorable experience with iconic waterfront backdrops.

name: Vina Robles Vineyards & Winery

It includes nearly 5,000 square feet of elegant indoor function space, along with outdoor areas such as terraces, patios, and a boutique amphitheatre, making it ideal for events of various sizes. Guests can enjoy soaring interiors and outdoor luxury for intimate or large gatherings.

name: Albertson Wedding Chapel
description: Albertson Wedding Chapel is a stylish and affordable wedding venue in Los Angeles, established in 1974 on the historic Miracle Mile, offering intimate ceremonies and micro-weddings for up to 54 guests with options for instant legal marriages and trendy decor. They provide personalized services including photography, floral arrangements, and receptions in a jewel-box setting with natural light and crystal chandeliers. Couples can choose from various packages that emphasize elegance and simplicity without the high costs of traditional weddings.

name: Dark Blue Events Venue
description: Dark Blue Events Venue in Modesto, CA, is an elegant space perfect for weddings, receptions, and other celebrations, featuring marble-like tile floors, crystal chandeliers, and accommodations for up to 220 guests with full services like catering and decorations. It offers a bright, airy environment for couples to host ceremonies and receptions, complete with professional consultation and state-of-the-art lighting. The venue provides a tasteful blend of beauty and elegance to create memorable events.

name: DeBell Golf Club
description: Landscaped golf facility providing an 18-hole & 9-hole course, disc golf & a restaurant.

name: San Jose Country Club
description: San Jose Country Club, established in 1899, offers a picturesque wedding venue in the foothills of Alum Rock with panoramic views of the Bay Area and lush emerald fairways. The elegant ballroom accommodates up to 225 guests and includes customized packages with options for outdoor garden ceremonies featuring seating, an aisle runner, and a wrought iron arch. Professional staff handle all details, including setup, cleanup, and private tastings, ensuring a memorable event.

name: Pardini's Catering & Banquets
description: Pardini's Catering & Banquets in Fresno offers elegant indoor event spaces like The Red Room and salons that accommodate weddings for up to 400 guests, featuring a mix of vintage and modern designs ideal for receptions and celebrations. The venue has undergone a recent makeover, including a 10,000-square-foot space with banquet rooms and an outdoor plaza, providing flexibility for wedding events. It is family-owned and emphasizes high-quality catering and service for special occasions.

name: The Paramount
description: The Paramount in Los Angeles is a historic ballroom venue ideal for private events, offering restored architecture, on-site catering, and event staff for up to 400 standing guests. It features a spacious main floor with a full bar and audio-visual equipment, making it suitable for weddings and other celebrations. As a mid-sized event space, it combines elegance with flexibility for personalized events.

name: Murrieta's Well
description: A historic 1884 winery estate in the Livermore Valley, Murrieta's Well offers an intimate wine country setting for weddings. The venue combines the serenity of the valley with easy Bay Area access—just over an hour from San Francisco. Award-winning in-house catering by the Wente culinary team features seasonal regional American cuisine designed to pair with the estate's wines. The venue's natural environment, heritage vines, and hillside views create an unmatched backdrop for ceremonies and receptions.

name: Sophie's Mediterranean Grill
description: Sophie's Mediterranean Grill in San Jose, CA, features a banquet room available seven days a week for events like bridal showers, anniversaries, and parties, accommodating up to 200 guests with Mediterranean cuisine and catering services. The venue offers a charming, casual Mediterranean ambiance suitable for celebrations, including options for private events and high-quality food. It provides wheelchair accessibility and delivery for added convenience during events.

name: Blomgren Ranch
description: Blomgren Ranch is a 29-acre venue located between the San Fernando Valley and Antelope Valley, featuring lush landscapes and multiple event sites like the barn, lawns, and gazebo, making it ideal for weddings. It has been recognized as a top ranch wedding venue in Southern California and offers on-site services to accommodate various event sizes and styles. Visitors have shared positive experiences, highlighting its beauty and space for special occasions such as weddings.

name: Fresno Fields by Wedgewood Weddings
description: Fresno Fields by Wedgewood Weddings is a classic and picturesque wedding venue in central California, featuring manicured gardens, a shaded terrace for ceremonies, and a spacious grand ballroom for receptions, accommodating up to 400 guests with lush landscaping and rustic touches. It offers all-inclusive packages, an onsite planning team, and awards like The Knot's Best of Weddings for its excellent services. Couples can enjoy photo opportunities in the gardens and modern interiors for a memorable event.

name: Life Arts Center Wedding and Events Venue
description: Life Arts Center is a historic wedding venue in downtown Riverside, CA, built in 1909, featuring elegant indoor spaces like Bella Manor for up to 150 guests and Victoria Vault for up to 200 guests, with a blend of vintage architecture and modern comforts. It offers customizable packages including setup, catering, bar services, and professional staff to ensure a seamless event. The venue is fully accessible and allows outside vendors for personalized weddings.

name: Dante Club Of Fresno
description: The Dante Club of Fresno is a budget-friendly, do-it-yourself wedding venue in the Fresno and Clovis areas, allowing couples to bring their own planners, decorators, and caterers while providing a full-service kitchen. It features versatile indoor spaces that can seat up to 300 guests and beautifully landscaped outdoor areas with a water feature and ample parking. This venue emphasizes affordability and customization for weddings and events.

name: 1880 Union Hotel
description: Cozy, Old-West-style hotel dating from 1880, offering traditional rooms & a wine bar.

name: Outer Harbor/Berth 46
description: Located in Los Angeles, Outer Harbor/Berth 46 is a versatile waterfront venue ideal for weddings, offering breathtaking views of the Pacific Ocean and skyline with both indoor and outdoor spaces for ceremonies and receptions. It accommodates a wide range of events including corporate functions and social gatherings, providing a picturesque setting along the coastline. The venue features state-of-the-art amenities and easy access to transportation for guests.

name: Virginia Robinson Gardens
description: Storied 20th-century mansion set on 6 acres of scenic gardens, offering tours by appointment only.

name: The Houdini Estate
description: The Houdini Estate is a historic five-acre property in Los Angeles' Laurel Canyon, once the home of magician Harry Houdini, featuring enchanting gardens, a waterfall, and terraced levels ideal for weddings. It offers both indoor and outdoor spaces for ceremonies and receptions, accommodating up to 1,200 guests with amenities like a swimming pool and hidden passageways. The venue provides a magical, mysterious atmosphere perfect for memorable events.

name: BRICK
description: BRICK is a historic 5,000 sq. ft. event space in San Diego's Liberty Station, featuring exposed brick walls, vaulted ceilings, and a flexible blank canvas ideal for wedding ceremonies and receptions. It offers 24-hour rentals, the ability to bring your own vendors, and accommodates up to 220 seated guests for a customizable wedding experience. Clients praise its modern yet historic ambiance and supportive planning services.

name: Museum of Ventura County
description: The Museum of Ventura County in Ventura, CA, features unique indoor and outdoor event spaces, including the Martin V. and Martha K. Smith Pavilion and Museum Plaza, making it ideal for weddings with historical charm and modern amenities. It can accommodate up to 300 guests for ceremonies and receptions, with features like a projector screen, sound system, and beautiful gardens or mosaics for picturesque backdrops. The venue is located in the heart of historic downtown Ventura, across from the San Buenaventura Mission, offering a blend of art, history, and elegance for memorable events.

name: Wilson Canyon Park
description: Wilson Canyon Park, part of the Mountains Recreation and Conservation Authority (MRCA), offers secluded wilderness, trails, and natural landscapes that can be used for outdoor weddings as MRCA allows events in their 75,000 acres of parkland. The park features verdant oak woodlands, a year-round creek, and commanding vistas, making it suitable for simple mountaintop ceremonies or nature-themed events. However, specific wedding details for this park are not explicitly detailed in the sources.

name: North Shore Beach and Yacht Club
L'Horizon Resort & Spa
description: Chic, 1950s-style rooms with glass walls & patios, plus a hot tub & a heated pool.

name: Woodland Hills Country Club
description: Woodland Hills Country Club in Los Angeles offers versatile wedding venues including the Terrace Ballroom for indoor receptions and the Garden for outdoor ceremonies, with options to combine spaces for seamless events. Planning is handled by Director of Events Rebecca Bauman, who assists with date selection, room pricing, and banquet options, while Executive Chef Alfie Salvatierra oversees culinary execution with fresh, Spanish-influenced flavors. The club hosts weddings for various guest sizes, featuring connected indoor and outdoor areas ideal for ceremonies, receptions, and related celebrations.

name: The Ebell of Los Angeles
description: The Ebell of Los Angeles is a historic wedding venue built in 1927, offering exclusive access to its elegant spaces like ballrooms, gardens, and green rooms for customized events. As a National Historic Landmark founded by suffragettes, it embodies a blend of grandeur and feminist history, making it ideal for immersive and theatrical weddings. Couples can enjoy features such as ornate ceilings, a fountain of honor, and in-house catering for a seamless experience.

name: Arnold Rue Community Center
description: Arnold Rue Community Center in Stockton provides flexible and fully equipped event spaces, including a gymnasium and multi-purpose rooms, ideal for hosting weddings and special celebrations with capacities up to 124 guests. It features amenities like a full kitchen, ample parking, and outdoor park areas adjacent to the center, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor wedding events. Rentals are available for various gatherings, catering to a range of event needs.

name: Four Seasons Resort and Residences Napa Valley
description: Refined luxury hotel on the grounds of a winery offering upscale restaurants, a spa & outdoor pools.

name: Jillian's
description: Romantic eatery serving refined, wine-paired European cuisine in a posh hacienda with a courtyard.

name: Palo Alto Hills Golf & Country Club
Chanslor Ranch
description: Casual guest ranch set on 378 acres offering relaxed rooms, plus horseback riding & scenic views.

name: Jurupa Hills Country Club
description: Jurupa Hills Country Club in Riverside, CA, features a scenic gazebo on the golf course's first tee for intimate wedding ceremonies, allowing for personalized events with one booking per day. The venue offers receptions in the clubhouse dining room with panoramic views, customizable dining options, and the flexibility to bring outside catering. It provides professional services including event staff and a changing room for the bride to ensure a seamless experience.

name: Rancho Bernardo Swim & Tennis Club
description: The Rancho Bernardo Swim & Tennis Club in San Diego offers rooms for rent specifically for wedding receptions and other private events, accommodating up to 230 guests in spaces like the multi-purpose rooms. As a members-only club, it provides facilities for social gatherings and entertainment, including a built-in barbeque area and outdoor amenities. The club emphasizes recreational and community use, making it suitable for smaller, intimate weddings or receptions.

name: Canyon Country Community Center
description: The Canyon Country Community Center features the Grand Room, which is ideal for weddings and receptions, accommodating up to 499 guests with a professional kitchen, outdoor patio, and terrace for ceremonies. It offers versatile indoor and outdoor spaces for events like galas and private gatherings, with rental options including banquet tables and stage equipment. The venue provides amenities such as picnic areas and a gymnasium, making it a multi-functional space for community events.

name: Rubel Castle
description: This historic, off-beat structure made with recycled materials offers tours by appointment.

name: Valencia Country Club
description: Valencia Country Club in Santa Clarita, CA, features a luxurious 45,000-square-foot clubhouse with flexible indoor and outdoor spaces for weddings of various sizes, including a ceremony lawn and ballroom. It offers stunning views of the emerald green golf course in the Santa Clarita Valley, accommodating up to 350 guests with professional event coordination and full-service catering. The venue is ideal for both intimate and large celebrations, providing a picturesque setting for lifelong memories.

name: Lawless Brewing Co.
description: Lawless Brewing Co. in North Hollywood, Los Angeles, is a modern brewery venue perfect for weddings, offering an 8,000 square foot space with indoor and outdoor areas that can host up to 300 guests. The venue features a brewhouse, taproom, mezzanine, game room, and outdoor patio, allowing for customizable celebrations with craft beer and various amenities. It is family and pet-friendly, with staff available to ensure events run smoothly.

name: Vineyard Hacienda
description: Charming Spanish-style hotel offering quaint rooms, an outdoor pool & a hot tub, plus lush gardens.

name: Deer Park Villa | World-Class Redwood Wedding Venue
Vibiana
description: Vibiana is a historic event venue in Downtown Los Angeles, originally built in 1876 as the city's first Catholic cathedral, now transformed into a full-service space for weddings with features like a Main Hall and Garden Courtyard. It offers customizable backdrops, state-of-the-art lighting and sound systems, and high-quality catering from renowned chefs. The venue combines elegant, timeless architecture with modern amenities for intimate to grand wedding celebrations.

name: Surfside Ranch
description: Surfside Ranch in San Diego provides a western-themed venue perfect for weddings, featuring a historic old west town setup with picnic areas and a down-home feel. It accommodates events like weddings alongside other occasions, offering add-ons such as pony rides and petting zoos for a unique rustic experience. The venue emphasizes safety and customization, with options for groups up to 25 people and starting rental fees around $240 per day.

name: BellaVista Rooftop & Events
description: BellaVista Rooftop & Events in Stockton, California, features a stunning rooftop terrace with panoramic views of the downtown skyline and waterfront, making it an ideal setting for weddings that can accommodate up to 300 standing guests or 180 seated. The venue offers versatile spaces like The Terrace for outdoor celebrations and The Dining Room for intimate indoor gatherings, with options for customized menus and professional event coordination. Their experienced team ensures a memorable experience tailored to weddings and other special occasions.

name: The Thursday Club
description: The Thursday Club is a historic wedding venue in San Diego's Point Loma, built in 1927 with Spanish architecture and offering stunning ocean views from its gardens and clubhouse. It provides outdoor ceremony spaces for up to 150 guests and indoor reception areas with elegant features like hardwood floors and stained glass windows. The venue supports various wedding types and includes amenities such as dressing rooms and approved catering options.

name: Cielo Farms Vineyard | Wedding & Event Venue
Holiday Inn Express & Suites Chico by IHG
description: Holiday Inn Express & Suites Chico offers a versatile meeting space, the Lotus Room, that can accommodate up to 25 guests for events like small weddings or receptions, with modern amenities and flexible layouts. The venue includes indoor facilities and an outdoor patio with a cozy firepit for additional event options. Guests can enjoy complimentary breakfast and other hotel services during their stay.

name: South Coast Winery
description: South Coast Winery Resort & Spa in Temecula offers a picturesque vineyard setting with Tuscan-inspired architecture, ideal for weddings amidst rolling vineyards and landscaped gardens. The venue provides flexible indoor and outdoor spaces for up to 500 guests, including options for ceremonies, receptions, and on-site accommodations like a complimentary bridal suite. With award-winning wines and personalized event planning, it ensures a luxurious wine country experience year-round.

name: Agate Cove Inn
description: Ocean-view lodging offering country-chic cottages, plus gourmet breakfast, gardens & a hot tub.

name: The Hibernia
description: The Hibernia is a historic wedding venue in downtown San Francisco, featuring the grand Main Hall that can accommodate up to 1,500 guests and a private outdoor rooftop with panoramic city views. It offers professional event production support and extensive dressing rooms for the bridal party, making it ideal for both large celebrations and intimate affairs.

name: Gingerbread Mansion Inn
description: Opulent Victorian B&B offering 11 luxe rooms & suites, some with claw-foot tubs & fireplaces.

name: The Pearl
description: The Pearl is a modern, multi-level event venue in San Francisco's Dogpatch neighborhood, featuring a rooftop with panoramic bay views for ceremonies and an expansive main floor with industrial elements like reclaimed cedar ceilings and indoor gardens for receptions. It offers in-house bar programs with craft cocktails and can accommodate up to 220 seated guests for weddings, making it versatile for various event needs.

name: Swedish American Hall
description: Swedish American Hall is a historic San Francisco landmark built in 1907, offering charming Arts and Crafts architecture with modern amenities for weddings. It features multiple event spaces like Freja Hall for receptions and Balder Hall for ceremonies, accommodating up to 700 guests with options for full-service catering and craft cocktails. The venue provides an exclusive, intimate atmosphere to celebrate love in a blend of old-world charm and contemporary services.

name: Bolero at Europa Village
description: Bolero at Europa Village is a Spanish-inspired winery in Temecula, CA, offering vibrant event spaces for weddings, including the Barcelona Barrel Room for up to 120 guests and the Gran Reserva Patio for outdoor gatherings amidst olive trees and wildflowers. It provides options for indoor and outdoor ceremonies, with features like wine tastings, tapas, and customizable menus to create a lively, romantic atmosphere. As part of Europa Village, it caters to wedding needs with services such as getting ready suites and full event coordination.

name: Grace E. Simons Lodge
description: Grace E. Simons Lodge is a picturesque venue located in Elysian Park, Los Angeles, featuring a serene lodge, a pond with a bridge, and outdoor picnic areas, making it ideal for weddings and events. It offers both indoor spaces for receptions and outdoor areas for ceremonies, accommodating up to 300 guests with amenities like a full kitchen and ample parking. The neutral-toned lodge allows for customizable decor to create the perfect wedding atmosphere.

name: The Plaza At Cabrillo Marina
description: The Plaza at Cabrillo Marina is a waterfront wedding venue in San Pedro, California, offering both indoor and outdoor spaces for ceremonies and receptions, with the indoor hall accommodating up to 120 guests and outdoor areas like the lawn and courtyard holding up to 250 guests. It features scenic marina views, a fountain patio, and customizable event options including event rentals and parking. Couples can enjoy an intimate paradise setting with ocean breezes and access to nearby attractions like Cabrillo Beach.

name: Mission Inn Hotel and Spa's Festival of Lights
description: The Mission Inn Hotel & Spa in Riverside, CA, features the Festival of Lights, an annual holiday event from late November to early January with over 10 million twinkling lights and festive decorations, creating a magical setting for winter weddings. This event includes live entertainment and family-friendly activities that can enhance wedding celebrations in the venue's historic spaces. Couples often incorporate the holiday ambiance into their events at chapels or ballrooms.

name: Oak Park Community Center
description: The Oak Park Community Center in Sacramento is a versatile event space that can accommodate weddings and gatherings for up to 250 guests, featuring amenities like a multipurpose room, auditorium, and outdoor areas for ceremonies. It provides rental options for various events, including access to meeting rooms and a warming kitchen to support wedding receptions. The center is managed by the City of Sacramento and offers a welcoming atmosphere for community events.

name: CIA at Copia (The Culinary Institute of America at Copia)
description: CIA at Copia in Napa, CA, provides a variety of picturesque indoor and outdoor spaces for weddings, including the Copia Culinary Gardens and the Jackson Family Wines Amphitheater, where couples can host ceremonies, receptions, and related events. Their expert team assists with menu development, beverage pairings, and custom decor to ensure a memorable experience. As part of the Culinary Institute of America, it's a unique epicurean destination that also benefits student scholarships.

name: L.A. Banquets - The Landmark
description: L.A. Banquets - The Landmark is an elegant wedding venue in Mission Hills, CA, featuring a grand ballroom with 25-foot ceilings, customizable LED lighting, and outdoor gardens for ceremonies and receptions. It offers VIP services including private dressing suites with champagne and refreshments, accommodating up to 850 guests with options for both indoor and outdoor events. The venue provides white-glove service, expert coordination, and luxurious amenities to create personalized, memorable weddings.

name: Four Lanterns Winery
description: Four Lanterns Winery in Paso Robles provides a picturesque vineyard setting for weddings and events, featuring outdoor spaces like patios, pools, and lawns ideal for ceremonies and receptions, along with indoor options in The Farmhouse for gatherings. The venue offers a relaxed, family-friendly atmosphere with award-winning wines and event hosting capabilities, including food pairings and live music. It is centrally located in the Willow Creek District, making it convenient for wine country celebrations.

name: Instant Marriage LA
description: Instant Marriage LA provides quick, legal wedding ceremonies in Los Angeles, offering packages that include obtaining a marriage license, performing a civil ceremony, and handling all necessary filings for couples needing fast services. They specialize in short-notice weddings, elopements, and unique situations like immigration or hospital weddings, with options for up to 20 guests in their premium package. Their services are conducted in their Encino office or at selected outdoor locations via travel packages.

name: The Links at Lakehouse (formerly St. Mark Golf Club)
Mission Hills Venue
description: At Mission Hills Venue in San Diego, CA, stunning downtown and Mission Bay views combine with a refined, modern design in a versatile 3,600-square-foot space, making it ideal for elegant weddings. The venue accommodates up to 200 guests and features clean lines, bright open areas, and an open-vendor policy for customizable events. It also includes options for both indoor and outdoor setups to create an unforgettable wedding experience.

name: The Beehive
description: The Beehive in Los Angeles is a dynamic event venue with expansive outdoor spaces like the Main Courtyard, featuring a honeycomb sculpture, hexagonal fountain, and artificial grass, making it ideal for outdoor weddings and celebrations; it also offers indoor options for events, accommodating up to 900 guests with modern amenities.

name: Holland Park West
description: Holland Park West in Fresno, CA, offers a picturesque outdoor wedding venue featuring stunning waterfalls, rock haven, and a timbers pavilion, perfect for ceremonies and receptions. The venue provides professional event staff to handle planning and execution, allowing couples to focus on their celebration. It can accommodate up to 600 guests in its spacious indoor and outdoor spaces, ensuring a memorable experience surrounded by natural beauty.

name: Tallman Hotel
description: Plush, country-chic rooms & suites in an upscale boutique hotel offering dining & free breakfast.

name: Rengstorff House
description: Historic home with Victorian Italianate architecture, tours & exhibits on 19th-century life.

name: Jose P. Rizal Community Center
description: The Jose P. Rizal Community Center in Sacramento is a versatile indoor venue ideal for weddings, accommodating up to 350 guests with a spacious gymnasium layout that supports ceremonies and receptions. It features polished wood flooring, audio-visual capabilities, and a well-appointed kitchen, making it suitable for customized events. Rental fees start at $180 for a ceremony and reception, providing an affordable option within the Southgate Recreation & Park District.

name: Casino San Clemente
description: Storied event space popular for weddings offering a ballroom, rock garden & patio with ocean vistas.

name: Sierra La Verne by Wedgewood Weddings
Churchill Manor

It provides comprehensive wedding packages with on-site catering, coordination, and luxurious guest rooms for an intimate or larger event. The venue is renowned for its personalized service, gourmet food, and ability to host elopements, receptions, and ceremonies in a romantic wine country setting.

name: The Julia Morgan Ballroom
description: The Julia Morgan Ballroom is a historic Beaux-Arts venue in downtown San Francisco, offering over 4,300 square feet of elegant, unobstructed event space perfect for weddings, complete with sweeping city views and a professional production team. It provides peace of mind through in-house catering, advanced audio-visual services, and customizable spaces for ceremonies and receptions. The venue's timeless finishes and amenities, like a hand-carved fireplace, make it one of the city's most celebrated wedding locations.

name: Mar Vista Farm + Cottages
description: Simple cottages with full kitchens, ocean views, free WiFi & access to an organic garden.

name: Simpson House Inn
description: Simpson House Inn is a historic Victorian estate in Santa Barbara, offering a picturesque garden backdrop for weddings with capacity for up to 125 guests, requiring a full buyout of the inn for two nights. The venue features lush gardens and event spaces for ceremonies and receptions, with amenities like third-party catering and entertainment options. It provides an intimate, English country-style atmosphere enhanced by its historic ambiance and professional coordination requirements.

name: The Barn at Meriam Park
description: The Barn at Meriam Park in Chico, CA, is a historic 130-year-old venue with rustic charm, featuring a 5,000 square foot barn and a 3,000 square foot lawn that can accommodate up to 500 guests for weddings and events. It offers modern amenities like stage lighting, sound systems, and customizable indoor and outdoor spaces for ceremonies and receptions. The venue provides a warm atmosphere with exposed wooden beams and natural beauty, making it ideal for creating unforgettable wedding experiences.

name: SmogShoppe by Marvimon
description: SmogShoppe by Marvimon is a 6,500-square-foot indoor-outdoor wedding venue in Los Angeles' Culver City Arts District, originally a smog check center transformed into a solar-powered space with vertical gardens and vintage furnishings. It supports weddings for up to 150 guests, featuring areas like the Courtyard for ceremonies and the Grand Hall for receptions, with an emphasis on sustainable design. The venue's adaptable layout allows for creative configurations, making it ideal for personalized events.

name: Harmony Ridge Lodge
description: Peaceful, rustic-chic retreat offering suites with forest or garden views, plus meeting space.

name: Retzlaff Vineyards
description: A historic Victorian estate winery just outside downtown Livermore, Retzlaff Vineyards sits amid ancient pepper trees, manicured landscaping, and sprawling estate vineyards. The property is known for its intimate, unhurried atmosphere—a place where time slows and guests relax. The venue has years of experience hosting personalized weddings and works closely with each couple to match their unique vision. A dedicated wedding coordinator is available to guide the planning process.

name: JULEP Venue
description: JULEP Venue in San Diego is a bright and airy blank canvas event space with 12,000 square feet of indoor-outdoor areas, perfect for weddings including ceremonies and receptions with custom room dividers and in-house services like tables and AV equipment. It features high gabled ceilings and floor-to-ceiling windows that photographers love, along with a professional events team to assist with planning. The venue accommodates large events and provides amenities for a seamless wedding experience.

name: Jefferson Street Mansion by Wedgewood Weddings
The Oak Grill
description: The Oak Grill in San Luis Obispo is an ideal venue for weddings, offering spaces for rehearsal dinners, private events, and large group gatherings in a convenient downtown location next to Hotel Cerro. It supports partial and full buyouts, making it suitable for various wedding-related celebrations like graduation parties. The venue focuses on fresh, locally sourced cuisine and provides an inquiry form for personalized event planning.

name: Chico Women's Club
description: At Chico Women’s Club in Chico, CA, couples can exchange vows in lush gardens surrounded by foliage or in a spacious indoor room with hardwood floors and large picture windows, creating a romantic yet laidback atmosphere. The venue accommodates up to 200 guests and includes amenities like tables, chairs, and a fully equipped kitchen for events. Rentals start at $1,000 for a full ceremony and reception, with options for both indoor and outdoor spaces.

name: Bright Spark Brewing & Restaurant

It features private areas such as the Dining Room for up to 75 guests and the Solarium for up to 30, with amenities like private bartending and banquet-style service to accommodate celebrations. As a family-owned establishment opened in 2022, it aims to be an inclusive and relaxed spot for all guests, with options for traditional, vegan, and gluten-friendly catering.

name: Inn At Occidental
description: Cozy lodging with gardens, classic rooms & original art, plus tasting passes for Sonoma wineries.

name: FACTORY OF DREAMS HALL SAN DIEGO
Hawk Ranch Wedding Venue & Farm and Animal Tours
San Ramon Waters by Wedgewood Weddings
Scribner Bend Vineyards
description: Scribner Bend Vineyards is a premier Sacramento vineyard wedding venue offering outdoor ceremonies amidst lush vines and scenic river views, with the option to host receptions in a historic barn. The venue provides flexible indoor and outdoor spaces for a seamless, personalized wedding experience, including professional coordination and access to manicured grounds. Couples appreciate the natural beauty and private estate feel for unforgettable photo opportunities.

name: Ultimate Skybox at DiamondView Tower
description: The Ultimate Skybox at Diamond View Tower is a luxurious rooftop wedding venue in San Diego, offering panoramic views of the city skyline, Petco Park, and San Diego Bay, making it ideal for ceremonies and receptions. It features a 4,500-square-foot space that includes both indoor areas with hardwood flooring and large windows, as well as a 100-foot outdoor patio with a fireplace, accommodating up to 180 guests with modern amenities and expert coordination. name: The Rink Studios
description: The Rink Studios is a historic 1926 building in Sacramento that offers a 5,500-square-foot auditorium blending original charm with modern features like an HD video wall and professional sound system, making it ideal for weddings. It can accommodate up to 300 seated guests for ceremonies, receptions, and related events, with amenities such as a stage and lighting to enhance the experience. Guests often describe the space as surprising and delightful for wedding celebrations.

name: The Ranch at Silver Creek by Wedgewood Weddings
description: The Ranch at Silver Creek by Wedgewood Weddings is a breathtaking San Jose wedding estate featuring panoramic views of rolling hills, lush canyons, and the city skyline, ideal for ceremonies and receptions. It offers a hilltop outdoor ceremony site with a dark wood arbor and an elegant indoor grand hall with stone accents and tray ceilings for up to 300 guests. Couples appreciate its rustic-yet-elegant Mediterranean atmosphere, luxurious suites, and comprehensive wedding packages from Wedgewood Weddings.

name: San Jose Woman's Club
description: The San Jose Woman's Club is a historic 1929 California Mission Revival style venue in San Jose, featuring a grand ballroom with 30-foot high ceilings and arched windows, making it ideal for weddings. It can accommodate up to 350 guests and includes additional spaces like the tea room and fireside room for events, offering a blend of historic charm and modern amenities. The venue provides professional support and is perfect for couples seeking an elegant, timeless setting.

name: The Grove: Santa Cruz Event Center
Movie Colony Hotel

name: Napa Golf Course
description: Fairview Napa at Napa Golf Course offers customizable wedding packages with stunning views of the area, accommodating intimate weddings for 50 guests up to grand galas for 225 guests. Their wedding planners assist in coordinating all aspects, making it easier than typical Napa Valley options by handling multiple vendors and arrangements. The venue is praised for its flexibility in styles and budgets, set amidst beautiful surroundings ideal for ceremonies and receptions.

name: Sundale Country Club
description: Sundale Country Club in Bakersfield, CA, is a premier wedding venue offering exclusive services like setup, catering, and event coordination with stunning golf course views for ceremonies and receptions. It provides customizable menus, linens, and champagne toasts, accommodating various event sizes with both indoor and outdoor spaces. The venue is ideal for weddings, ensuring a stress-free experience with professional assistance from their dedicated team.

name: Beltane Ranch
description: Refined B&B on a working ranch with vineyards & orchards, plus walking trails & a tennis court.

name: Urban Putt San Jose

It features artist-designed holes inspired by local landmarks and dedicated event staff to help with planning, making it a fun and interactive option for weddings or similar gatherings. name: Galway Downs by Wedgewood Weddings
