name: Poinsettia Pavilion
description: The Poinsettia Pavilion in Ventura, CA, offers elegant indoor rooms and an outdoor patio with stunning ocean views, ideal for wedding ceremonies and receptions. The Ventura Room can accommodate up to 250 guests for dining, featuring a stage, dance floor, and AV systems for a seamless event. On-site staff are available to assist, ensuring everything is set up and managed for the couple's special day.

name: Nakoma Resort
description: Chic resort featuring dining, a spa & a golf course, plus a Frank Lloyd Wright-designed clubhouse.

name: Pozo Saloon
description: A throwback to 1800s California, this longtime rustic saloon offers burgers, BBQ & outdoor concerts.

name: California State Fair
description: The Farm at Cal Expo is a 3.5-acre outdoor venue perfect for weddings and receptions, featuring lush flower beds, fruit and vegetable crops, an outdoor kitchen, bleacher seating, restrooms, and shaded picnic tables. The Pavilion offers a versatile indoor option with nearly 100,000 square feet, suitable for larger wedding events like dances or parties, with high ceilings and concrete floors. These spaces at the California State Fair grounds provide beautiful backdrops for memorable occasions.

name: Dragonfly Tea Room
description: Dragonfly Tea Room in Modesto, CA, specializes in hosting private parties and showers, offering a charming setting for intimate events like weddings with options for themed afternoon teas and wine cocktails. They require reservations and handle event details, including seating for gatherings. The venue provides a delightful atmosphere with tea services and retail items, making it suitable for smaller, elegant wedding celebrations.

name: Dale E. and Sarah Ann Fowler Events Center
Loft 84 Wedding and Event Venue
description: Loft 84 is a historic landmark loft in Riverside, CA, originally opened in 1928 and restored as an official Historical Landmark, featuring beamed ceilings, chandeliers, and a second-floor balcony for weddings and events. It offers the Citrus Ballroom for up to 200 guests for receptions and includes professional event management to ensure celebrations run smoothly. The venue specializes in fun, joy, and customization for weddings with spaces like the Bridal Penthouse Suite.

name: Aurora Banquet Hall
description: Aurora Banquet Hall is a contemporary banquet hall in Los Angeles, offering advanced amenities and services tailored for weddings, including a spacious ballroom, bridal suite, and customizable lighting for a personalized experience. It accommodates up to 300 guests and features a serene courtyard for outdoor ceremonies, along with high-tech elements like directional sound systems to enhance events. The venue's staff and management ensure seamless execution for weddings and other celebrations.

name: Village of OM Plant Kitchen
description: Village of OM Plant Kitchen in Sacramento features a stunning rooftop venue for private events, offering fully catered plant-based cuisine and a serene ambiance, making it ideal for intimate weddings or gatherings with expert sushi staff to ensure a memorable experience.

name: Evergreen Community Center
description: Evergreen Community Center in San Jose features a large multipurpose room and patio area, making it suitable for wedding rentals such as ceremonies and receptions. It offers amenities like classrooms and adjacent parks, and is designed to host various events including weddings and community gatherings. The center provides flexible spaces for up to 210 guests in its multi-use room.

name: Scripps Seaside Forum
description: Scripps Seaside Forum is a picturesque beachfront venue in La Jolla, San Diego, offering stunning ocean views and flexible spaces for indoor and outdoor weddings, allowing couples to personalize their events as a blank canvas. It has hosted over 100 weddings with features like modern architecture and panoramic Pacific Ocean backdrops, making it ideal for ceremonies and receptions. The venue accommodates a variety of wedding styles, from relaxed beach vibes to elegant affairs, and has been featured in wedding publications.

name: Briar Rose Winery
description: Nestled in Temecula's wine country, Briar Rose Winery offers an enchanting venue modeled after Snow White's cottage, featuring 40 acres of picturesque vineyards ideal for weddings and events. The property provides versatile outdoor spaces for ceremonies and receptions, complete with event rentals like tables, chairs, and wine services, supported by a dedicated event team. It hosts various celebrations such as weddings, engagements, and anniversaries, ensuring a personalized and memorable experience.

name: The University Club of Palo Alto
HammerSky Vineyards
description: HammerSky Vineyards is a 50-acre estate in Paso Robles, featuring rolling vineyards, ancient oak trees, and a restored 1904 farmhouse, making it an ideal setting for romantic weddings and elopements. The venue offers versatile spaces including a rustic barn, outdoor ceremony sites with sweeping views, and indoor areas for receptions. Couples can customize their events with options for up to 100 guests and overnight accommodations in the farmhouse.

name: San Clemente Shore by Wedgewood Weddings
Muslim Community Center of Greater San Diego
description: The Muslim Community Center of Greater San Diego offers marriage services and facility rental, making it suitable for hosting weddings and Islamic ceremonies in a community-oriented environment. It features spaces that can accommodate events, supported by their programs and services for the community. Reviews highlight the welcoming atmosphere and available areas for gatherings.

name: La Lomita Ranch
description: La Lomita Ranch in San Luis Obispo is a timelessly romantic wedding venue offering vibrant spaces for ceremonies and receptions, with capacity for up to 400 guests amidst stunning vineyard views and outdoor areas like the Plaza and Oak Courtyard. The property features an indoor Pavilion for events, along with luxury accommodations in eight suites for up to 24 guests, providing a seamless and intimate experience. Testimonials praise the staff's exceptional coordination and the venue's Spanish charm, making it ideal for memorable weddings.

name: The Roof Garden
description: Chic quarters in a high-end property featuring an outdoor pool, a spa & 2 restaurants.

name: Sun City Palm Desert - Sunset View Clubhouse
Killer Queens Social House
description: Killer Queens Social House in Riverside offers customizable private event spaces for occasions like engagements and bachelorettes, featuring craft cocktails, crave-worthy food, and options to book the entire venue for up to 300 guests. Their team handles the details to ensure a seamless experience, making it suitable for wedding-related celebrations with a vibrant, energetic atmosphere. It serves as a prime downtown location for hosting milestone events with personalized packages.

name: Royal Banquet
description: Royal Banquet in San Diego offers elegant banquet halls like the Royal Hall and Diamond Hall, featuring palace-inspired designs with arches, columns, and large chandeliers, perfect for weddings and receptions. They provide all-inclusive packages that cover decorations, food, bar services, and entertainment for up to 300 guests, ensuring a memorable event. Located at 8990 Miramar Road, it's conveniently situated between Escondido and Chula Vista for easy access.

name: Shannon Community Center
description: The Shannon Community Center's Ambrose Hall is a premier wedding venue in Dublin, CA, featuring a spacious 5,940 square-foot hall that can accommodate up to 300 guests, with elegant mission-style architecture, floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a creek, and natural wood elements for a romantic atmosphere. It includes a full catering kitchen and an outdoor courtyard perfect for ceremonies or receptions, enhancing the overall wedding experience with its traditional design and lush landscapes. This venue combines indoor elegance with outdoor beauty, making it ideal for couples seeking a blend of historic charm and modern functionality.

name: Casa Real at Ruby Hill Winery
description: Casa Real at Ruby Hill Winery is a luxurious Mediterranean-style villa nestled in Pleasanton's Livermore Valley wine country, providing an idyllic setting for weddings with lush vineyards, elegant gardens, and sophisticated indoor spaces. It offers options for both outdoor ceremonies in the Sun Garden and indoor receptions in the Grand Salon or Amber Room, complete with professional coordination and amenities. The venue is designed for romantic celebrations, blending natural beauty with refined architecture to create unforgettable wedding experiences.

name: Sterling Hotel by Wedgewood Weddings
description: The Sterling Hotel by Wedgewood Weddings is a historic Victorian-style venue in downtown Sacramento, featuring elegant details like a stained-glass dome, multiple ceremony spaces including a courtyard and indoor chapel, and on-site lodging for up to 200 guests. It offers a blend of historic elegance and contemporary sophistication, with options for both indoor and outdoor events near the State Capitol. Couples can enjoy amenities such as a grand hall for receptions and professional on-site coordination.

name: The Inn at Europa Village
description: The Inn at Europa Village offers luxurious hillside lodging with vineyard views, featuring rooms like the Vineyard Master Suite and Deluxe King Balcony, which can serve as part of wedding accommodations within the Europa Village estate; it integrates with the overall property's wedding offerings, providing a private Mediterranean retreat for couples and guests, though it's primarily focused on lodging rather than dedicated event spaces.

name: Calamigos Ranch Resort & Spa
description: Polished quarters in a hip family-run retreat with 5 restaurants & a free beach club shuttle.

name: Seghesio Family Vineyards
description: Long-running (since 1895) winery known for its zinfandels, offering tastings, food & wine events.

name: Rancho De Las Palmas - Moorpark, CA
Central Coast Brewing
description: Central Coast Brewing in San Luis Obispo offers versatile event spaces for weddings, including indoor and outdoor areas that can host everything from ceremonies to receptions, with options for full wedding weekends including accommodations in The Lofts. The venue features handcrafted microbrews, impeccable dining with local organic ingredients, and can accommodate groups from 20 to 400 guests for various wedding events. It provides a rockstar chic vibe with epic entertainment and customizable packages that include brewery tours and private events.

name: Gershon Bachus Vintners
description: Gershon Bachus Vintners is a picturesque winery in Temecula, CA, offering outdoor wedding ceremonies with a handmade stone and iron gazebo surrounded by vineyards and mountains. The venue features a private Bridal Room for preparations, a covered Cocktail Patio for receptions, and the Barrel Room that can accommodate up to 200 guests with customizable table settings. Couples can enjoy breathtaking views and on-site amenities like gourmet catering for a seamless event.

name: Pangloss Cellars
description: Wine, cheese & charcuterie served in a chic room with old stone walls & reclaimed wood floors.

name: Chowchilla-Madera County Fair and Event Center
Millwick by Marvimon
description: Millwick by Marvimon is a 7,000-square-foot indoor-outdoor wedding and event venue in DTLA’s Arts District, blending organic and industrial aesthetics with features like a Garden Courtyard surrounded by vertical gardens and a Grand Hall for ceremonies and receptions. It can accommodate up to 175 seated guests and includes amenities such as a cinema screen, disco ball, and private lounges for a unique wedding experience. The venue is praised for its versatile spaces, making it ideal for romantic weddings followed by receptions or other events.

name: Princeton Event Center
description: Princeton Event Center in Modesto, CA, offers a remodeled ballroom that seats up to 800 guests, ideal for weddings with options for full-service catering, decorations, and professional photo services. The venue also features a party room for smaller events and includes amenities like Chiavari chairs and an outdoor patio. User reviews highlight its clean spaces and attentive staff, making it a popular choice for wedding receptions and special occasions.

name: Hacienda de las Flores by Wedgewood Weddings
Crazy Horse Saloon
description: Crazy Horse Saloon in Chico, CA is a 13,000 square foot country-themed nightclub that offers event hall rentals, catering, private parties, banquets, and receptions, making it suitable for wedding events with features like a large dance floor and outdoor patio. It provides amenities such as a full bar, beer and wine, and an outdoor space for gatherings, though it's primarily known for entertainment. The venue is equipped for lively celebrations but lacks specific wedding-focused details like bridal suites.

name: Music Academy of the West
description: The Music Academy of the West in Santa Barbara, CA, offers elegant wedding and event venue rentals on its beautiful nine-acre beachside campus, featuring historic halls like Hahn Hall and gardens perfect for ceremonies and receptions. This historic estate provides a sophisticated setting with architectural charm and free parking, ideal for hosting musical or traditional weddings. It is renowned for its year-round programs and summer events, adding a cultural touch to celebrations.

name: The Gardens at Heather Farm
description: This 6-acre destination with botanical gardens hosts special events & offers classes.

name: Las Positas Vineyards
description: Las Positas Vineyards in Livermore, CA, provides a romantic winery setting ideal for weddings, featuring breathtaking vineyard views, outdoor ceremony spaces, and elegant indoor banquet rooms for receptions. Couples can enjoy a picturesque backdrop with options for al fresco events on lawns or patios, complemented by the venue's wine country charm and professional event support. This family-friendly location has hosted numerous weddings, blending Old World craftsmanship with modern amenities for memorable celebrations.

name: Hudson Loft
description: Hudson Loft is a versatile event space in Downtown Los Angeles, featuring a customizable loft, a 14,000 sq ft rooftop with panoramic city views, and various floors for indoor weddings, accommodating up to 250 guests with amenities like dressing rooms and lounge furniture. It allows for personalized urban celebrations, including weddings with options for both indoor and outdoor settings. The venue is praised for its proximity to attractions like the Staples Center and includes on-site coordination for events.

name: Cuvier Club by Wedgewood Weddings
description: Cuvier Club by Wedgewood Weddings in La Jolla, San Diego, offers a blend of elegant indoor and outdoor spaces with stunning ocean views, including a grand hall with cathedral ceilings and a private courtyard surrounded by lush greenery and botanical blooms. This venue is ideal for ceremonies and receptions, featuring options for up to 200 guests and professional coordination to bring wedding visions to life. It provides all-inclusive packages for a seamless experience in a coastal setting.

name: Napredak Hall
description: Napredak Hall is an elegant wedding reception venue in San Jose, CA, offering customizable indoor and outdoor spaces for up to 400 guests, complete with a commercial kitchen, stage, and full-service bar for dining and entertainment. It provides a secluded, green setting ideal for weddings with great photo opportunities and personalized services to make the event memorable. The venue has been hosting weddings since its establishment, ensuring a classic yet naturally beautiful atmosphere.

name: Chateau du Sureau
description: Luxurious lodging with a stone turret & posh rooms, plus a renowned restaurant & a swanky spa.

name: Lucid Winery & Event Venue
description: Lucid Winery & Event Venue in Sacramento offers a beautiful and spacious indoor event space with wine tanks, barrels, walnut tables, and bars, ideal for weddings and special occasions. The venue provides options for private events, including wine tastings and pairings, in a casual yet elegant atmosphere. It's suitable for intimate gatherings with access to both indoor and outdoor areas.

name: VASA San Diego
description: VASA San Diego is a versatile event venue in San Diego's North Park neighborhood, offering nearly 8,000 square feet of indoor and outdoor space perfect for weddings, with options for ceremonies and receptions. Their expert team provides personalized planning and coordination to ensure a seamless experience, including customizable catering and decor. Clients frequently praise the professional staff and elegant ambiance for creating unforgettable wedding memories.

name: See Canyon Fruit Ranch
description: See Canyon Fruit Ranch is an outdoor wedding venue in San Luis Obispo, CA, surrounded by oak trees, hills, a heavenly garden, and a picturesque apple orchard, ideal for ceremonies and receptions. It features breathtaking gardens, a dance floor, gazebo, and barns, and has been hosting weddings for over 20 years. The venue is available for hire from April to November and is known for its diverse and intimate settings.

name: Canyon Oaks Country Club
description: Canyon Oaks Country Club in Chico, CA, offers specialized wedding services with picturesque settings like the Vista Room for up to 150 guests and The Grove for outdoor ceremonies, featuring stunning golf course views and personalized event management. Their team, including a private event director, handles all details from setup to coordination, ensuring a stress-free experience. Positive reviews from past clients highlight the venue's affordability, professionalism, and ability to create memorable weddings.

name: Grand Pavilion Banquet Hall
description: The Grand Pavilion Banquet Hall in Sacramento, CA, offers a spacious 20,000 square feet of custom-designed space ideal for weddings, accommodating up to 700 guests with in-house services like catering, audio, lighting, and a VIP suite for the bride and groom. It features elegant interiors with high ceilings, professional staff, and options for themes, ensuring a seamless event experience. The venue also includes a patio for additional seating, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor wedding elements.

name: Berryessa Community Center
description: At Berryessa Community Center, we provide an enchanting setting for your special day, where love and celebration unite. Our wedding venue boasts timeless elegance, versatile spaces, and modern amenities. Choose us for a wedding that reflects your unique love story.

name: Santa Rosa Golf & Country Club - CA
Inn on Randolph
description: Inn on Randolph in Napa, CA, is a historic estate ideal for intimate weddings, elopements, and vow renewals, offering spaces for up to 43 guests with options for outdoor ceremonies and indoor events. The venue provides personalized services such as officiants, photographers, and event coordination to help realize couples' visions. It features a serene garden setting and cozy cottages, making it a boutique choice for small gatherings in the Napa Valley.

name: Bellaire Banquet Hall
description: Bellaire Banquet Hall in North Hollywood, Los Angeles, features a unique live fish aquarium dance floor and can accommodate up to 350 guests for events, making it a distinctive choice for celebrations. The venue offers customizable menus with Mediterranean-style appetizers and entrees, along with services like parking and DJ to enhance the experience. Pricing starts at $11,900 for 150 guests on weekdays, providing an elegant indoor space for special occasions like weddings.

name: Arterra
description: Arterra in San Diego provides modern private dining spaces and an outdoor lounge perfect for wedding receptions, offering creative local cuisine and exceptional service for occasions like weddings. The venue features three distinct indoor rooms accommodating up to 75 guests each and an outdoor area for up to 400 guests, ensuring flexibility for various event sizes. Their dedicated team, including a restaurant sales manager, handles event planning to create unforgettable experiences.

name: Hacienda San Diego ( Outdoor Venue)
description: Nestled in the rolling hills outside San Diego, CA, La Hacienda is a serene outdoor wedding venue featuring a picturesque gazebo, panoramic countryside views, and versatile spaces for ceremonies and receptions that can accommodate up to 300 guests. The venue provides amenities like string lighting, lounge areas, and a bar, with an experienced events team dedicated to customizing the day. Tables, chairs, linens, and lighting are supplied to ensure a seamless outdoor celebration.

name: La Nebbia Winery
description: Winery known for its hearty reds offering daily tastings, with a shop selling wines, cheeses & more.

name: Bella Blanca Event Center
description: Bella Blanca Event Center in North Hollywood is a premier wedding venue offering newly remodeled ballrooms and a spacious outdoor patio for elegant celebrations, accommodating up to 500 guests with full-service planning and customization options. It features a dedicated bridal suite and on-site staff to handle every detail, ensuring a seamless and sophisticated experience for weddings and related events. The venue combines urban aesthetics with attentive service, making it ideal for intimate gatherings or grand receptions.

name: Old St. Hilary's Preserve
description: Windswept 122-acre natural area with rare wildflowers, a historic church & bay views.

name: San Pedro Elks Lodge #966
description: San Pedro Elks Lodge #966 in San Pedro, CA, is a historic venue established in 1905, offering stunning views of the Port of Los Angeles and multiple event spaces for weddings, including indoor rooms for up to 300 guests and an outdoor pool deck. It provides amenities such as catering, bar services, and on-site accommodations to host ceremonies and receptions seamlessly. The lodge's team works directly with couples to ensure a personalized experience.

name: Dunsmuir Hellman Historic Estate
description: The Dunsmuir Hellman Historic Estate is a 37-room Neoclassical Revival Mansion on 50 acres in Oakland, CA, offering elegant indoor and outdoor spaces for weddings, including a garden pavilion, gazebo, and expansive meadow. It accommodates up to 300 guests for ceremonies and receptions, combining rich history with features like wood-paneled rooms and landscaped grounds. The venue provides a serene, historic setting perfect for memorable celebrations with family and friends.

name: Fresno County Clerk
description: The Fresno County Clerk's office in Fresno, CA, serves as a location for obtaining marriage licenses and facilitates simple courthouse weddings in a professional, government setting. Couples can exchange vows in an intimate indoor environment, focusing on the essentials without elaborate decorations. This venue is ideal for straightforward, no-fuss ceremonies that emphasize the legal and personal aspects of marriage.

name: Palisades Gazebo Park
description: Intimate park featuring a gazebo, manicured grounds, a rose garden & elevated views of the sea.

name: The Garden by Tannery Bend Beerworks
description: The Garden by Tannery Bend Beerworks is an indoor/outdoor beer garden and full-service restaurant in Napa, CA, featuring fresh beers on tap, an extensive cocktail list, and live music, making it suitable for private events like weddings; it offers spaces for gatherings with options for hosting parties, including morning coffee service and all-day menus, in a classic brick building in the Downtown Napa WEST END district.

name: Residence Inn by Marriott Valencia
description: Celebrate the wedding of your dreams at the Residence Inn by Marriott Santa Clarita Valencia, which offers 5,000 square feet of event space for up to 150 guests in its versatile rooms. The venue provides professional event planning services and state-of-the-art audiovisual equipment to ensure a seamless experience for your special day.

name: The Venice Beach House
description: The Venice Beach House is a small, outdoor wedding venue in Venice Beach, CA, offering a historic 1911 craftsman home and gardens for intimate ceremonies and receptions. It provides a magical beachside setting ideal for micro gatherings with family and friends, including options for full house rentals with access to bedrooms and common spaces. This venue emphasizes a tranquil, ocean-breeze atmosphere for creating memorable wedding experiences.

name: Point San Pablo Harbor, The Knot Club
Mexican Heritage Plaza
description: Mexican Heritage Plaza in San Jose is a cultural center offering beautiful outdoor spaces and lush gardens, ideal for weddings and events that blend arts and community vibes. It hosts ceremonies and receptions with a capacity for large gatherings, and has been featured for themed weddings incorporating bohemian and desert elements. The venue supports nonprofit initiatives, making it a meaningful choice for couples.

name: El Tango Reception Hall
description: El Tango Reception Hall is Bakersfield's premier wedding venue, featuring a spectacular main hall that can host up to 500 guests for various wedding styles including Western, Indian, and Arabic, along with an enchanting garden courtyard for outdoor ceremonies up to 100 guests. They offer all-inclusive packages that include curated vendors for photography, DJs, florists, and catering, ensuring a seamless and stress-free planning experience. With over 13 years of expertise, the venue provides exceptional service and customizable spaces for elegant celebrations.

name: Etage Event Venue
description: Etage Event Venue in Los Angeles offers a spacious 3,800 sq. ft. ballroom for up to 300 guests, featuring customizable amenities like LED lighting, a dance floor, and professional catering to make weddings unforgettable. It provides all-inclusive packages with a private bridal room, outdoor patio, and attentive staff to handle every detail for a seamless celebration. The venue is designed for various wedding styles, ensuring couples can personalize their event while enjoying upscale services.

name: Croad Vineyards
description: Croad Vineyards in Paso Robles offers a stunning venue with majestic views of vineyards and oak-covered hills, featuring Spanish mission architecture for weddings from small ceremonies to events up to 100 guests, and includes on-site lodging for convenience.

name: Martin Johnson House
description: The Martin Johnson House is a historic oceanfront cottage in La Jolla, San Diego, built in 1916, offering breathtaking views of the Pacific coastline and lush cypress trees. It serves as an ideal setting for intimate weddings and receptions, with grassy areas for outdoor ceremonies and indoor spaces in the rustic cottage. The venue can accommodate over 100 guests and is part of the Scripps Institution of Oceanography campus.

name: Mitchell Katz Winery
description: Single-vineyard wines can be tasted in a converted wooden barn at this small winery.

name: Kaleidoscope Inn & Gardens
description: Traditional rooms with antiques & private bathrooms in a gingerbread Victorian B&B with a garden.

name: Hotel Marisol Coronado
description: Sophisticated hotel in a restored 1926 building, plus free WiFi & continental breakfast.

name: The Fig House
description: The Fig House is a design-forward wedding venue in Highland Park, Los Angeles, featuring vibrant mid-century interiors, art-deco details, and lush garden courtyards that accommodate up to 250 seated guests for ceremonies and receptions. It offers exclusive in-house services including catering, bar, and event coordination through 24 Carrots Catering & Events, making it ideal for creative and memorable weddings. The space seamlessly blends indoor and outdoor areas for a magical, California-charm experience.

name: Bianchi Winery Paso Robles
description: Bianchi Winery in Paso Robles is a 40-acre estate ideal for weddings, featuring a tasting room with a deck over a koi-stocked lake and a pergola shaded by an ancient oak tree, perfect for ceremonies and receptions. The venue accommodates various event sizes, from intimate dinners to larger gatherings on the manicured lawn or vineyard. It blends Old World charm with modern accents, offering spaces for cocktail hours, dancing, and photos by the waterfall-fed lake.

name: Secret Garden at Rancho Santa Fe
Koi Zen Cellars
description: Koi Zen Cellars is a craft winery in San Diego with a relaxing tasting room featuring a koi pond, making it suitable for private events and weddings. They offer spaces for events, tastings, and meetings, emphasizing a tranquil atmosphere. As an urban winery, it provides indoor seating and opportunities for customized gatherings.

name: Fenestra Winery
description: Fenestra Winery offers a picturesque setting for weddings and special events. Nestled among vineyards, the winery provides a romantic and memorable backdrop for your celebration. With its charming ambiance and award-winning wines, Fenestra Winery is an ideal choice for couples seeking a unique and elegant venue.

name: The Oviatt
description: The Oviatt is a historic 1928 Art Deco penthouse and rooftop venue in downtown Los Angeles, ideal for luxury weddings with spaces that blend timeless glamour and modern versatility for up to 120 guests. It offers customizable event packages, including all-inclusive options for ceremonies and receptions, with a dedicated team handling details from planning to execution. The venue features indoor penthouse areas and a two-level rooftop terrace, perfect for creating unforgettable celebrations.

name: Greens on Tenth
description: Greens on Tenth is a premier event venue in downtown Modesto, California, specializing in weddings with offerings like chef-crafted catering, full-service bars, and in-house floral design. It provides both indoor and outdoor spaces for up to 250 guests, along with professional event planning services to customize the experience. The venue features areas for wedding parties to prepare and host ceremonies and receptions.

name: Relentless Brewing Company
description: Relentless Brewing & Spirits in Temecula offers a private mezzanine that can host wedding receptions and other events for up to 35-40 guests, with the option to book the entire restaurant for larger gatherings. They emphasize a welcoming atmosphere for celebrations like weddings, focusing on craft beers, spirits, and community connections. This venue is ideal for intimate to moderately sized events in a brewery setting.

name: Grand Venue
description: Grand Venue in Los Angeles is a luxurious event space designed for weddings, featuring elegant ballrooms with capacity for up to 450 guests and amenities like state-of-the-art lighting, sound systems, and catering services. It offers customizable decor and professional coordination to create unforgettable wedding experiences, including options for ceremonies and receptions. The venue also includes outdoor courtyard spaces for intimate events.

name: Palacio Torres
description: Palacio Torres is a banquet facility in the Northeast San Fernando Valley, featuring Early California architecture combined with state-of-the-art kitchen and event spaces, making it ideal for weddings and receptions. It offers professional event services to create memorable experiences for special occasions like weddings, with options for customization to meet guest needs. The venue is praised in reviews for handling wedding events smoothly with on-site staff support.

name: Dana Adobe at Historic Rancho Nipomo
Brentwood's Co. Co. County Wine Co.
The Alexandria Ballrooms
description: The Alexandria Ballrooms is a historic wedding venue in downtown Los Angeles, built in 1906, featuring three elegant ballrooms that have hosted weddings for Hollywood stars and dignitaries, including Charlie Chaplin's ceremony. It offers luxurious spaces like the Palm Court with arched ceilings and chandeliers for up to 260 seated guests, and the larger Mezz accommodating up to 500 for receptions with industrial-chic exposed brick walls. The venue has received multiple awards for excellence in wedding hosting and provides access to dressing rooms and on-site amenities.

name: Villa Royale
description: Cozy rooms in an upscale, Tuscan-inspired resort offering 2 pools, gardens & European dining.

name: My Love Wedding Chapel
description: My Love Wedding Chapel in Riverside County, CA, offers both indoor and outdoor spaces for intimate weddings, featuring customized ceremonies led by experienced ministers to reflect each couple's unique love story. The venue provides packages starting at $295, including options for up to 80 guests, a decorated chapel, and services like filing the marriage license. It's designed to create timeless, romantic memories with personalized touches such as private bride rooms and flower walls.

name: The Bayside Pavilion at Safe Harbor South Bay
Fortino Winery and Event Center
description: Expansive, long-running winery & tasting room producing dry-farmed vintages in tranquil surrounds.

name: Oxnard Historic Farm Park
description: Place where 2 of the city's oldest buildings stand, a home & winery built in the 1870s.

name: The Driftwood Lodge - Vacations, Weddings, Reunions, Retreats & Offsites
San Luis Obispo Botanical Garden
description: The San Luis Obispo Botanical Garden features a 2,140 square foot Pavilion on 150 acres, ideal for weddings with audience seating for 120, dinner for 96, or up to 200 for cocktails, blending sustainability and natural beauty. It includes facilities like a commercial kitchen, ADA-compliant restrooms, and surrounding garden courtyards for events. The venue supports wedding rentals with options for custom quotes and alcohol service.

name: Paradise Ballrooms: Banquet Hall & Event Center
The Wedding Bowl
description: The Wedding Bowl at Cuvier Park in La Jolla, San Diego, is a scenic outdoor venue overlooking the Pacific Ocean, ideal for small and intimate weddings with natural seaside cliffs and grassy areas as a backdrop. It accommodates DIY ceremonies and micro weddings, offering a simple yet enchanting setting for up to 40 guests. This venue is popular for its ocean views and proximity to beaches, making it a favored spot for elopements and private celebrations.

name: Antelope Valley Winery
description: Picturesque vineyard offering a wine-tasting room, tours, a seasonal farmers' market & gift shop.

name: Rancho Buena Vista Adobe
description: Preserved circa-1845 adobe house & event venue with tours, a gift shop & an art gallery.

name: Gjelina Hotel Venice Beach
description: Gjelina Hotel in Venice Beach offers a versatile backdrop for weddings with a mix of indoor and outdoor spaces, including full property buyouts for ceremonies, group dinners, and accommodations. It provides amenities like catering from their restaurants, seasonal flowers, furniture rentals, and bridal suites to simplify planning. Located one block from the beach, it's ideal for intimate celebrations with friends and family.

name: The Barton House of Redlands
description: This remodeled home of a prominent doctor & wine-maker was the 1st brick structure in the region.

name: Darlington House
description: Darlington House is an enchanting wedding venue in La Jolla, San Diego, featuring historic architecture and lush garden landscapes just steps from the Pacific Ocean, ideal for intimate gatherings or large celebrations. It offers customizable outdoor spaces like the Rose Garden and Egyptian Patio for ceremonies and receptions, while supporting the community as it's owned by a non-profit dedicated to housing and feeding seniors. Couples rave about its magical, fairytale-like setting and attentive staff that ensure a seamless event.

name: The Box SF
description: The Box SF is a historic wedding venue in San Francisco, originally a 1920s printing plant, featuring unique spaces like the Main Room and Gate Room with antique furniture and natural light for up to 150 guests. It offers an on-site venue manager to ensure smooth events and includes options for bridal suites on the second floor. The venue blends modern and vintage charm, making it ideal for memorable wedding receptions and photoshoots in its letterpress shop or hidden Speakeasy.

name: Rancho Jimenez
description: Rancho Jimenez is an outdoor wedding and event venue located in the scenic hills of Santa Clarita, California, featuring fairy lights, a spacious dance floor, and customizable amenities for up to 500 guests to create memorable celebrations. It offers a private, exclusive atmosphere with professional services like security, audio systems, and entertainment stages to ensure a seamless experience. Established in 2015, the venue emphasizes family values and attention to detail for weddings and special events.

name: Rios-Lovell Winery
description: Rios-Lovell Winery is a family-owned estate in Livermore, CA, featuring picturesque grounds with vineyards, gardens, a gazebo, and an event center, making it ideal for weddings with panoramic views of the surrounding hills. The venue offers spaces like the Garden with Fountains and Wedding Gazebo for up to 260 guests, and it produces award-winning wines on site. Its unique country French style and professional event management enhance the wedding experience.

name: John Thurman Field
description: John Thurman Field in Modesto, California, is a minor league baseball stadium that has been used for non-traditional weddings, such as one in 2019 where a couple celebrated on the field where they met, making it a fun and unique outdoor space for events. The venue features the baseball field and stadium seating, allowing for creative photo opportunities and gatherings. It is primarily known for sports but has hosted weddings as special events.

name: Temescal Beach House
description: Temescal Beach House is a historic stone building in Oakland, CA, overlooking a lake and surrounded by gardens, offering both indoor and outdoor spaces for weddings and receptions. It accommodates up to 80 guests and features a patio for ceremonies and a fireside room for intimate gatherings, providing a romantic, nature-filled setting. The venue is managed by East Bay Parks and is popular for its urban oasis vibe with waterfront views.

name: Montecito Club
description: Montecito Club in Santa Barbara, CA, is a historic venue offering breathtaking ocean and mountain views, with elegant spaces like the Great Room featuring vintage Baccarat crystal chandeliers and the Ballroom with original 1918 wood beam ceilings. It provides versatile options for weddings, including the expansive Great Lawn for outdoor ceremonies and receptions, accommodating up to 300 guests with a blend of classic sophistication and modern luxury. The dedicated team ensures personalized attention, making it ideal for intimate gatherings or grand affairs.

name: The Ranch House at Audie Murphy Ranch
Boulder Ridge by Wedgewood Weddings
description: Boulder Ridge by Wedgewood Weddings is a luxurious hilltop venue in San Jose, CA, offering panoramic views of Almaden Valley and featuring a scenic golf club setting with craftsman-style architecture. It includes an outdoor event lawn for ceremonies, a grand hall with a fireplace for receptions, and amenities like an outdoor bar and fire pits for guest comfort. This venue provides all-inclusive wedding packages with expert coordination for a stress-free experience.

name: Mettler Family Vineyards
description: Organically farmed wine estate for more than 100 years with a tasting room & landscaped grounds.

name: Carondelet House
description: Carondelet House is a historic 1920s Italian-inspired brick building in Los Angeles, offering a unique blend of vintage textures and urban flair for weddings, with features like exposed brick walls, hardwood floors, and various event spaces. The venue includes two outdoor courtyards and indoor areas suitable for ceremonies and receptions, accommodating up to 150 guests for seated events. It provides in-house catering by Très L.A. Catering, making it a comprehensive choice for intimate weddings.

name: Hennessey Estate
description: Hennessey Estate is a historic Victorian property in downtown Napa offering full estate buyouts for private events and celebrations, such as anniversaries and honeymoons, with features like 10 ensuite rooms and exclusive access to a pool and gardens. It provides spaces for private dining, meetings, and outdoor gatherings, making it suitable for intimate weddings or related events. Guests can enjoy chef-prepared meals and personalized services for a memorable experience.

name: Fairview Metropolitan
description: Fairview Metropolitan in Oakland, CA, is an affordable outdoor wedding venue adjacent to a golf course, offering stunning views of the San Francisco skyline and customizable all-inclusive packages for ceremonies and receptions. It can accommodate weddings from 50 to 225 guests, with options including dinner, DJ, and cocktail hours. The venue features a spacious lawn for outdoor events and a fully enclosed pavilion with a built-in dance floor for indoor celebrations.

name: City of Santa Clarita: Newhall Community Center
description: The Newhall Community Center in Santa Clarita offers versatile indoor and outdoor spaces for events like banquets and Quinceañeras, with the Multi-Purpose Room accommodating up to 388 guests and equipped for performances. It includes rentable areas such as a dance room and outdoor stage, making it suitable for wedding celebrations. Additional amenities like a PA system and tables are provided at no extra charge.

name: Morris Chapel
description: Inside and out, Morris Chapel at the University of the Pacific in Stockton, CA, offers a picturesque setting for weddings with its beautiful stained-glass windows, arched entryways, deep stained woodwork, and massive columns, creating a romantic and historic atmosphere. It is a religious and historic building that accommodates ceremonies, receptions, and elopements for up to 300 guests. The venue provides various services including bridal suites, clean-up, and on-site coordination to ensure a seamless event.

name: Hearts Home Farms
description: Wooded 4-acre farm & event venue offering 4 cozy B&B cottages.

name: The Grand Annex Music Hall
description: The Grand Annex Music Hall is a cabaret-style theater in San Pedro, Los Angeles, perfect for couples seeking a unique and theatrical wedding experience, featuring a 150-person capacity with audience seating, a raised stage, and a greenroom that can double as a bridal suite. It offers state-of-the-art sound systems, lighting, and flexible layouts for personalized events in a vibrant arts district setting. Additional amenities include a projection screen and options for various seating arrangements to accommodate wedding celebrations.

name: The Davies Family Inn at Shadowridge Ranch
description: Rustic lodge with cabins & suites, plus 200-capacity events tent, dressing rooms & catering kitchen.

name: The Point
description: The Point is a waterfront wedding venue in San Diego on Mission Bay, offering outdoor ceremonies with beach views, customizable packages including arches and sound systems, and indoor options for receptions. It provides a blend of natural beauty like ocean breezes and elegant settings for intimate or grand celebrations, with features such as fire pits and lawn games to enhance the experience.

name: Secret Garden at Sycamore Mineral Springs Resort & Spa
description: The Secret Garden at Sycamore Mineral Springs Resort & Spa in San Luis Obispo, CA, provides a serene and intimate outdoor setting for weddings, featuring a garden area with a gazebo and sprawling lawn ideal for ceremonies and receptions. This venue offers on-site amenities like mineral spring hot tubs, a day spa, and farm-to-table catering to enhance the wedding experience. Couples can enjoy personalized planning services and exceptional attention to detail for a memorable event.

name: Belle's Wedding Chapel
description: Belle's Wedding Chapel in Santa Clarita, CA, is a French-inspired elegant wedding venue that blends shabby chic aesthetics with modern sophistication, offering customizable ceremonies for civil, romantic, or spiritual weddings. They provide affordable packages accommodating up to 30 guests, with options for indoor chapel settings or outdoor locations like beaches and parks. The venue emphasizes personalized services, including bridal rooms and on-site coordination, to create memorable and stress-free wedding experiences.

name: Terra Mia Resort and Wedding Venue
description: Terra Mia Resort and Wedding Venue is a charming outdoor wedding venue located on 30 private acres in Paso Robles, California, featuring vineyards, a peaceful lake, waterfalls, and romantic willow trees for a fairytale-like setting. It offers capacity for up to 200 guests and includes amenities like on-site getting-ready suites, a terracotta reception patio, and an amphitheater for ceremonies. Ideal for couples seeking a relaxed, elegant vineyard wedding with natural beauty and intimate vibes.

name: El Camino High School Center for the Arts
description: El Camino High School Center for the Arts in Sacramento is a modern performing arts venue featuring an auditorium with up to 500 seats, suitable for wedding ceremonies and receptions. It includes a transparent lobby and expansive roof overhang that extends outdoors, providing versatile spaces for events. The center is designed for community gatherings, including weddings, with durable and acoustically optimized interiors.

name: Tower Beach Club
description: Tower Beach Club is a waterfront wedding venue on Mission Bay in San Diego, featuring over 4,300 square feet of indoor and outdoor event space with panoramic bay views and a wraparound deck. It accommodates up to 200 guests for ceremonies and receptions, offering flexibility with an open vendor policy and amenities like a bridal suite. The venue provides a quintessential San Diego beach lifestyle experience, ideal for couples seeking a scenic and customizable wedding setting.

name: Temecula Old Town Loft
description: Temecula Old Town Loft is a family-owned event venue in the heart of Old Town Temecula, offering a modern loft space ideal for weddings with 6,000 square feet of air-conditioned indoor area and 1,500 square feet of covered outdoor patio equipped with fans, misters, and fire pits. It features two full-service bars with a full liquor license, state-of-the-art sound and projection systems for music and dancing until 2 AM, and can accommodate up to 363 guests for creating memorable wedding celebrations. The venue provides a versatile canvas for customization, including options for all-inclusive packages and the ability to bring in personal vendors.

name: Cal Aero Events - Hangar Weddings, Corporate Events, Special Events and More!
Saint Peter - All Hallows' Parish
description: Saint Peter - All Hallows' Parish is a historic Catholic church in Sacramento, featuring stained-glass windows, a full choir loft, and traditional architecture, making it a serene and spiritual venue for weddings; the church offers rental information for events, suggesting it can accommodate ceremonies with its indoor spaces and community-focused atmosphere; as a parish, it provides a meaningful setting for religious weddings with options for English, Spanish, and Hmong services.

name: Seal Beach Yacht Club
description: Seal Beach Yacht Club offers a scenic waterfront venue for weddings, featuring a two-story clubhouse with stunning views of Alamitos Bay and options for in-house catering and a full bar. It accommodates various event sizes from intimate gatherings to larger celebrations, making it ideal for nautical-themed or relaxed outdoor weddings. As a highly regarded yacht club, it provides a fun and friendly atmosphere for memorable events.

name: Florin Creek Recreation Center
description: Florin Creek Recreation Center in Sacramento is a budget-friendly venue for weddings, featuring lush lawns and an outdoor amphitheater for ceremonies, as well as a spacious indoor area with vaulted ceilings that can accommodate up to 120 seated guests for receptions.

name: Moravia Wines & Event Venue
description: Moravia Wines in Fresno, CA, is a rustic vineyard venue ideal for weddings, featuring outdoor ceremony sites among the vines and spacious lawns for receptions with string lights and ample seating. It offers inclusive packages starting at $4950 that include tables, chairs, linens, a fully-furnished bridal suite, and an on-site coordinator for seamless events. The venue accommodates up to 350 guests and emphasizes a historic, elegant atmosphere with options for customization.

name: Pine Hill Lodge
description: Tranquil woodland lodge with indoor & outdoor event spaces, including a cedar deck.

name: LA Celebrations Banquet Halls
description: LA Celebrations Banquet Halls in Downtown Los Angeles offers an elegant grand ballroom perfect for weddings, seating up to 250 guests with high ceilings, century-old chandeliers, and customizable themes. They provide all-inclusive wedding packages that include bridal suites, event coordination, and options for ceremonies in connected outdoor spaces like the Town House Garden. This historic venue ensures a stress-free experience with amenities such as catering and bar services.

name: Weddings at Temecula Creek Inn
description: Temecula Creek Inn is a historic hotel wedding venue in Temecula, CA, offering rustic outdoor spaces like The Stone House and The Meadows for ceremonies and receptions amidst rolling hills and oak trees. It accommodates up to 270 guests and provides award-winning services including catering, accommodations, and event planning. The venue combines countryside elegance with golf resort amenities for a memorable wedding experience.

name: Almost Famous Wine
description: Almost Famous Wine – World class stage and night-time tasting room in Livermore, California. SHOWS FAQ SHOP Located at 2271 S Vasco Road, Livermore, California AN AWARD-WINNING TASTING ROOM WITH A WORLD-CLASS STAGE, SOUND AND LIGHTING. ALMOST FAMOUS is the tasting room for our award-winning portfolio of wines, made by the same master-class winemaking team as Darcie Kent Estate Winery (our sister winery!) Our menu features over 15 wines in diverse styles, but all grown, harvested, and bottled here in the San Francisco Bay AVA.

name: The Bridge Yard
description: The Bridge Yard is a historic restored building in Oakland, originally a street car maintenance facility, featuring panoramic waterfront views of the Bay Area and a versatile event space. It includes a light-filled indoor area with 12,500 square feet and an outdoor courtyard with a stage and seating, making it ideal for weddings and receptions. The venue can accommodate up to 500 guests for seated dinners and offers event coordination services.

name: La Grande Estates – Weddings & Fine Events Venue
Savanna Rooftop
description: Savanna Rooftop is a luxurious rooftop wedding venue in Downtown Los Angeles, offering both indoor and outdoor spaces with Tulum-inspired decor and Mediterranean vibes for up to 350 guests. The venue provides customizable wedding packages that include event staff, bar services, and on-site representatives to ensure a seamless experience. Its versatile settings make it ideal for ceremonies, receptions, and other celebrations, featuring stunning city views and modern amenities.

name: The Break Room
description: The BreakRoom in Santa Clarita offers a spacious auditorium that accommodates up to 330+ guests, ideal for weddings with features like a raised stage, lighting, sound equipment, and an optional technician; it can be combined with other areas such as the outdoor patio and The BreakRoom for receptions. This venue is versatile for various events including weddings, providing options for large gatherings with professional setup.

name: San Diego Elks Lodge #168
description: The San Diego Elks Lodge #168 provides a hall specifically for weddings and receptions, accommodating over 100 guests with options for full catering, a bar, and a commercial kitchen. Its convenient location near major highways in San Diego offers ample free parking and flexible event times. This venue is suitable for various events, including social gatherings and corporate functions, making it a practical choice for wedding celebrations.

name: The General's Residence
description: The General’s Residence at Fort Mason in San Francisco is a historic waterfront venue offering stunning views of San Francisco Bay, Alcatraz, and the Golden Gate Bridge, making it ideal for elegant weddings. It features renovated indoor spaces such as a ballroom, dining room, and a bridal suite, along with an outdoor rear lawn perfect for ceremonies. This prestigious location combines military history with sophisticated charm, accommodating up to 400 guests for various wedding events.

name: Southside Community Center
description: The Southside Community Center in San Jose is a versatile venue ideal for weddings and events, featuring a multi-purpose room that can host celebrations like weddings, quinceañeras, and baptisms, with amenities including classrooms, lounges, and adjacent parks for outdoor elements. It offers rentals for various occasions, emphasizing community building through quality programs and special events. The center provides staff support for assistance during rentals, ensuring a welcoming atmosphere for up to 250 guests.

name: Sinsheimer Park Baseball Stdm
description: Sinsheimer Park, which includes the baseball stadium, offers facilities suitable for weddings and receptions, such as barbecue areas and outdoor spaces that can accommodate events with special permits. The park provides amenities like pedestrian trails and playgrounds, making it a versatile option for outdoor celebrations. However, details are general and not specific to the baseball stadium itself.

name: Bakersfield Racquet Club
description: Bakersfield Racquet Club provides a unique venue for weddings and events, centrally located in Bakersfield, California, with facilities including tennis courts, pools, and a garden patio suitable for celebrations. It offers spaces for various occasions like weddings and pool parties, fostering a community atmosphere with amenities for relaxation and activities. Members can rent the space for special events, ensuring a versatile setting for both indoor and outdoor gatherings.

name: The Ruse Healdsburg
description: Plush rooms, suites & a cottage in an upscale hotel built in 1883, plus a pool & free hot breakfast.

name: Wolfe Heights Estates Winery
description: Wolfe Heights Estates Winery in Sacramento is a luxurious wedding venue featuring scenic vineyards, olive orchards, and natural elements like ponds, waterfalls, and a Unity Circle for ceremonies. The property includes a spacious courtyard that seats up to 300 guests for receptions, along with amenities such as a bridal suite and tavern-style bar for events. It's designed for elegant weddings with a Napa-inspired feel, offering both indoor and outdoor spaces for a memorable experience.

name: Bakersfield Firefighter’s hall
description: Bakersfield City Firefighters Hall is an event venue in Bakersfield, CA, that has been used for weddings and celebrations, featuring indoor space with basic amenities like tables and chairs. Reviews indicate it accommodates events for around 100 guests but has issues with heat, unprofessional management, and limited access to features like air conditioning. Despite these, it includes a patio for outdoor elements, making it a functional but problematic choice for weddings.

name: South Bay Event Center
description: South Bay Event Center in San Pedro, CA, is a hilltop venue offering panoramic views of the Los Angeles Harbor and skyline, ideal for weddings with options for indoor and outdoor ceremonies and receptions. It accommodates up to 250 guests and provides customizable services including catering, themed linens, and RGB uplights for a personalized experience. The venue features elegant banquet spaces and outdoor patios, ensuring a seamless and memorable event.

name: Primal House
description: Primal House in Paso Robles offers a private event space ideal for gatherings, featuring live music, culinary classes, and a setting that celebrates local agriculture, making it suitable for weddings with its blend of indoor and outdoor amenities. The venue combines a butcher shop, market, brewery, and eatery, providing a unique farm-to-table experience for events. It includes options for private bookings and hosts various events, enhancing its appeal as a wedding location.

name: The Palms Restaurant and Banquet Hall
Parkview Event Place
description: Parkview Event Place is an outdoor wedding venue in the countryside of Fresno, California, featuring a 5-acre property with year-round green spaces, gazebos, luminous lighting, water fountains, and a large gathering court under a protective structure. It specializes in hosting weddings, quinceañeras, and other special events, with amenities like ample parking, clean bathrooms, and a bridal suite for a picturesque countryside experience. The venue is surrounded by almond trees, providing an ideal setting for memorable outdoor celebrations.

name: Tuolumne River Lodge
description: Tuolumne River Lodge in Modesto, CA, provides an enchanting wedding venue with versatile spaces including a Banquet Hall, Wedding Lawn, and Garden Room on five and a half acres along the Tuolumne River, ideal for ceremonies and receptions. The grounds feature outdoor areas with grassy fields, picnic spots, and river access, making it perfect for couples seeking a scenic and community-oriented setting. As a member-owned facility, it offers a cozy atmosphere for special events like weddings.

name: Kellogg House
description: Weddings, meetings & other events at a 1926 ranch-style estate with verdant grounds & walnut trees.

name: Biddle Ranch Vineyard
description: Biddle Ranch Vineyard is a 17-acre estate in San Luis Obispo featuring a spacious Vineyard House that can accommodate up to 12 guests, making it ideal for weddings with its blend of rustic, mid-century modern, and contemporary design. The venue offers outdoor ceremony spaces with mountain and field views, along with amenities like gardens, a wood-burning fireplace, and a pizza oven for elegant events. It is located in the Edna Valley and can host up to 130 guests for romantic, modern weddings.

name: Dalmatian-American Club
description: The Dalmatian-American Club in San Pedro, CA, is a full-service banquet facility renowned for its stunning ocean views and excellent service, making it a popular choice for weddings as highlighted in their event hosting details. It features award-winning cuisine by chef Tony Pielin and has been voted the best banquet facility in the South Bay, ensuring a memorable experience for couples and guests. This venue promotes a welcoming atmosphere rooted in community and fellowship, ideal for special occasions like weddings.

name: ShotClock Studios, LLC
description: ShotClock Studios, LLC in Oakland, CA, provides versatile event spaces suitable for weddings, with options for up to 130 guests and amenities like wireless internet and outdoor areas. They offer packages starting at $3,000 for weddings, including full venue access for receptions and other celebrations. The studio focuses on creating memorable events in modern, flexible settings tailored to various occasions.

name: The Sinclair on G Street
description: The Sinclair on G Street is a historic 5,700 sq ft event venue in downtown San Diego's Gaslamp District, featuring original exposed brick, vaulted ceilings, and wood floors, serving as a versatile blank canvas for weddings and events. It accommodates up to 200 seated or 250 standing guests, with amenities like a furnished bridal suite, custom bars, and two floors for ceremonies and receptions. Couples praise its central location, lack of noise restrictions, and ease of use for both indoor wedding setups and after-parties.

name: Log Cabin at the Presidio
description: The Log Cabin at the Presidio is a historic rustic lodge built in 1937, located in San Francisco's Presidio National Park, offering indoor spaces with wooden beams, a fireplace, and large windows for natural light, as well as outdoor lawns with views of the Golden Gate Bridge, making it ideal for wedding ceremonies and receptions. It provides a versatile floor plan suitable for up to 250 guests and is managed by Wedgewood Weddings for seamless event planning. This venue combines urban accessibility with natural serenity, featuring amenities like onsite catering and parking.

name: The Hollins House Weddings & Events
description: Spacious room offers golf course views plus a variety of fine American eats under soaring ceilings.

name: Event Center at Bear Springs Hotel
Kindred Oak Farm
description: Kindred Oak Farm in Paso Robles, CA, is a luxurious Bed and Breakfast Farmstay set on 20 acres of park-like grounds with century-old oaks, vineyards, and organic gardens, making it ideal for weddings and private events. The venue offers customizable experiences including gourmet farm-to-table meals and various outdoor and indoor spaces for ceremonies and receptions. As a working farm, it provides a unique, rustic-chic atmosphere for couples seeking a bespoke wedding getaway.

name: Lombardi House
description: Lombardi House is a historic 1904 Victorian estate in Hollywood, Los Angeles, featuring a refurbished barn with 35-foot vaulted ceilings and lush gardens ideal for weddings. It offers indoor-outdoor spaces for up to 250 guests, including ceremonies, receptions, and on-site suites for a complete experience. The venue provides luxury bar services and is perfect for personalized weddings blending Hollywood glamour with natural beauty.

name: The City Club of San Francisco
description: The City Club of San Francisco is a premier wedding venue featuring elegant Art Deco details, stunning city views, and all-inclusive services for ceremonies and receptions. It offers personalized event planning, coordination, and spaces like the Main Dining Room and Penthouse for up to 300 guests. The venue provides exceptional catering with fresh, organic ingredients and exclusive access for private events.

name: MOHI Ranch
description: Boutique, family-run winery in the hills with a tasting room established in the early 1900's.

name: The White Barn - Edna Valley
description: Nestled in the heart of Edna Valley in San Luis Obispo, The White Barn is a historic rustic dairy barn transformed into a magical wedding venue surrounded by the Santa Lucia Mountains, offering scenic views and original redwood paneling for ceremonies and receptions. It provides multiple outdoor and indoor spaces, including a spacious barn, lush lawns, and a courtyard, all adorned with string lights for a picturesque atmosphere. The venue accommodates up to 400 guests outdoors and 300 indoors, making it ideal for weddings with options for cocktail hours, dinners, and dancing.

name: Stemple Creek Ranch | Organic Ranch, Wedding & Event Venue
The Lighthouse at Glen Cove Marina
Masonic Center of Modesto
description: The Masonic Center of Modesto is a versatile banquet hall in Modesto, CA, perfect for wedding receptions, ceremonies, and other events, with a capacity for up to 200 guests and amenities like a fully equipped kitchen and outdoor function area. It offers easy access and various rooms suitable for different wedding needs, including spaces for dining and gatherings. Contact the venue for specific rates and availability to plan your event.

name: The Palms Venue & Villas
description: Situated in Chico, CA, The Palms Venue & Villas is a wedding venue featuring lush gardens, gazebos, waterfalls, and a ballroom, offering a tropical escape for ceremonies and receptions with multi-sensory experiences amid greenery. It includes various ceremony locations, dressing suites, a prep kitchen, and photo opportunities for up to 300 guests. The venue also provides villas for accommodations, enhancing the retreat-like atmosphere for weddings and events.

name: Cute Little Wedding Chapel
description: The Cute Little Wedding Chapel in Long Beach specializes in fun, romantic micro weddings with options for indoor and outdoor ceremonies, offering instant marriage licenses and ceremonies for up to 30 guests. It provides affordable, all-inclusive packages with personalized touches like Elvis-style weddings and professional photography. Couples appreciate the intimate settings, such as the elegantly decorated indoor chapel or the lush Tropical Terrace, making it a convenient and memorable choice in Southern California.

name: Sierra Meadows Ranch, Lodging and Equestrian Boarding
description: Laid-back lodge on a horse ranch offering warm cabins with kitchens, plus a restaurant.

name: Dresser Winery, Vineyard and Luxury Vacation Rental Villa
description: Dresser Winery's Luxury Estate Villa in Paso Robles, CA, offers a luxurious 6,300 sq. ft. property ideal for intimate special events, featuring stunning vineyard views, outdoor amenities like a pool and hot tub, and indoor spaces for gatherings. The venue includes five bedrooms, multiple bathrooms, and areas for events, making it suitable for weddings or celebrations with up to 10 guests. Contact Catherine at Dresser Winery for inquiries about hosting such events.

name: Santa Teresa Catholic Church
description: Santa Teresa Catholic Church in San Jose provides a spacious event hall for special occasions like weddings, accommodating up to 300 guests with included chairs, tables, and basic kitchen facilities. The venue requires a rental deposit and insurance, with rates starting at $800 for registered parishioners for the first four hours. As a church, it offers a meaningful setting connected to their sacramental services for marriage.

name: Valentine DTLA by Marvimon
description: Valentine DTLA by Marvimon is a 9,000-square-foot modern wedding venue in Downtown Los Angeles, featuring a tropical greenhouse courtyard and a Sunset Dining Room for ceremonies and receptions. It accommodates up to 240 guests for seated weddings and offers versatile indoor and outdoor spaces with artistic elements like murals and sculptures. The venue is designed for creative events, including weddings, with features like a commercial kitchen and private suites.

name: Stockton Rod & Gun Club Inc
description: The Stockton Rod & Gun Club features a 4,000 sq.ft. banquet hall available for rent, accommodating up to 500 guests for dancing or 240 for dining with bar service, making it suitable for weddings and special events. Located in Stockton, California, the venue offers scenic views and outdoor spaces like a patio for ceremonies or receptions. It is equipped with facilities for events, including tables, chairs, and access to the main hall for indoor celebrations.

name: Unitarian Society of Santa Barbara
description: The Unitarian Society of Santa Barbara is a historic, non-denominational church offering a serene Sanctuary for wedding ceremonies and beautiful outdoor courtyards for receptions, featuring Spanish Revival architecture with vaulted ceilings and stained-glass windows. The venue includes spaces like the Parish Hall for indoor events and the Parish Courtyard for al fresco gatherings, accommodating up to 285 guests. It welcomes couples of all faiths and orientations with inclusive policies and provides options for various event sizes.

name: The Bankers Ballroom
description: The Bankers Ballroom is a historic wedding venue in Fresno, California, located in the Pacific Southwest Building, featuring a majestic ballroom with a gilded ceiling, marble floors, and natural light from soaring windows, accommodating up to 500 guests for ceremonies and receptions. It offers flexibility for couples to choose their own vendors and provides spaces like The Vault for additional events such as rehearsal dinners. This elegant setting combines 1920s grandeur with modern amenities for a timeless celebration.

name: Hecker Pass Winery and La Vigna Event Center
LUXE Cruises: Weddings, Corporate Events & School Proms Venue
Casita Hollywood
description: Casita Hollywood is a versatile indoor-outdoor wedding venue in the heart of Hollywood, featuring lush courtyards, manicured gardens, and Spanish Colonial architecture for ceremonies and receptions. It offers amenities like a full commercial kitchen, cocktail bar, and outdoor fireplace, accommodating up to 350 guests for standing events. The space provides customizable event production services to ensure a seamless and memorable wedding experience.

name: Flora
description: Flora The Venue in San Diego is a botanical paradise featuring lush living walls, over 130 live plants, and elegant indoor spaces designed for weddings and events. It offers personalized planning services to create bespoke experiences, blending modern elegance with natural elements in the heart of the Gaslamp Quarter. Couples can celebrate with versatility for intimate or grand gatherings, supported by a team that ensures every detail aligns with their vision.

name: La Lo La Rooftop
description: La Lo La Rooftop, located on the 34th floor of AC Hotel Downtown LA, offers a sophisticated outdoor terrace with panoramic views of Los Angeles, making it an ideal setting for weddings with space for up to 250 standing guests and in-house catering for events. The venue provides options for live music and specialty cocktails, enhancing the experience for private celebrations like weddings. It requires prior approval for decorations and has restrictions on certain items, ensuring a seamless event.

name: Diamond Banquet Hall & Catering
description: Diamond Banquet Hall & Catering in Oakland, CA, offers a versatile and elegant space for weddings, accommodating up to 350 guests with customizable decor and on-site catering to suit various themes. Their experienced staff works closely with clients to plan and execute memorable events, ensuring every detail from seating to cuisine reflects the couple's vision. The venue features a spacious dance floor and amenities like chandeliers for a sophisticated atmosphere.

name: Rotunda
description: The Rotunda in Oakland offers a historic atrium with a soaring glass dome and grand staircase, making it an ideal setting for elegant weddings that blend timeless architecture with modern amenities. It features versatile spaces like the Rotunda Atrium and Seven Spokes for ceremonies and receptions, accommodating up to 1,500 guests with options for both intimate and grand celebrations. In-house coordinators ensure seamless planning for a personalized wedding experience.

name: LUCE LOFT
description: Luce Loft is a historic urban wedding venue in Downtown San Diego, located in the 1928 Qualitee Dairy Warehouse, featuring a high-arch barrel ceiling, poured concrete walls, and multiple furnished loft spaces for a rustic-industrial charm. It includes amenities like farm tables, chairs, getting-ready suites, market string lights, and in-house sound systems, making it ideal for ceremonies and receptions. The venue can accommodate up to 150 guests and offers full-day rentals with catering from Coastal Cuisine & Cocktail Co.

name: Camron-Stanford House
description: Camron-Stanford House is a historic Victorian landmark in Oakland, featuring a picturesque garden with twinkling lights, an antique fountain, and views of Lake Merritt, making it ideal for weddings from June to October. It offers private use of the house and garden, including seating for up to 125 guests and a two-hour rehearsal period, with transparent pricing and no hidden fees. The venue provides recommended vendors and emphasizes outstanding customer service to ensure a seamless event.

name: The Prestige Venue
description: The Prestige Venue in San Jose, CA, is a modern and elegant indoor space designed for intimate weddings, accommodating up to 100 guests with customizable options and included amenities like round tables, chairs, and audiovisual equipment. It serves as a family-owned venue focused on creating memorable events, ideal for ceremonies and receptions with a relaxed atmosphere. The space features soaring ceilings and natural light for a sophisticated backdrop.

name: Cabrillo Pavilion
description: The Cabrillo Pavilion is a historic beachfront venue in Santa Barbara, featuring panoramic ocean views and direct access to East Beach for ceremonies on the sand. It offers an idyllic indoor event space for up to 200 guests, including an entry lounge, open-plan area, and two outdoor terraces, making it perfect for weddings and receptions. Renovated in 2020, it provides amenities like a catering kitchen and amplified music options for a memorable celebration.

name: Flow Yoga & Wellness
description: Flow Yoga & Wellness in Santa Barbara specializes in hosting wellness-inspired private events such as bridal showers and bachelorette parties, offering customizable packages with activities like yoga, massages, saunas, and sound baths in a serene studio space; guests can enjoy the entire venue for intimate relaxation and connection, though alcohol is not permitted.

name: Sacred Sands
description: Eco-chic rooms in a straw-bale home offering panoramic desert views & private outdoor showers.

name: Lovely Day
description: Lovely Day is a historic event venue in Oakland's Longfellow neighborhood, located in a 140-year-old former Streetcar Barn, offering elegant indoor spaces and a spacious outdoor courtyard for wedding receptions and other gatherings for up to 500 guests. It features a warm, inviting atmosphere with industrial charm, high ceilings, and options for shared meals and craft cocktails. The venue is designed for a variety of events, including weddings, with flexible spaces that can accommodate both intimate and larger celebrations.

name: Higuera Ranch
description: Higuera Ranch is a historic luxury wedding venue in San Luis Obispo, California, featuring the ancient Higuera Tree from 1769, an Olive Grove, and a Rustic Barn built in 1904 for ceremonies and receptions. It offers breathtaking views of the Santa Lucia Mountains and luxurious accommodations for extended stays, blending ranch life with modern comforts. Guests can enjoy outdoor spaces for vows and indoor areas for celebrations, making it ideal for memorable weddings.

name: Toro Bravo Arena
description: Toro Bravo Arena is a family-owned sports arena and event location on Fresno's outskirts near the San Joaquin River, hosting private events such as weddings and quinceañeras alongside its traditional Thursday Night Bull Riding. It offers a versatile space for celebrations, blending outdoor elements with arena facilities. This venue is known as one of Fresno's best-kept secrets with a decades-old tradition.

name: The Lodge at Two Moons
description: Rustic lodge dating from the early 1900s offering upscale rooms and straightforward cottages.

name: Chapman Estate
description: Built in 1930, this English Tudor–style mansion now hosts opera & symphony fundraising events.

name: Islamic Center of Mira Mesa (Masjid Hamza)
description: The Islamic Center of Mira Mesa, known as Masjid Hamza, hosts Nikah ceremonies, which are Islamic wedding rituals, making it a suitable venue for Muslim weddings in a spiritual setting. Families and couples appreciate its family-operated approach and personalized planning for weddings in the Central Valley.

description: SKYstudio in Downtown Los Angeles is a modern penthouse venue featuring 30-foot tall windows with 300-degree views of the city, ideal for wedding photography and ceremonies with stunning backdrops like sunsets over the San Gabriel mountains and Pacific Ocean; it offers a sleek, neutral space with polished concrete floors and customizable white walls, making it perfect for personalized weddings; the venue supports up to 275 guests and includes options for events like receptions with Film LA permits.

The venue is positioned to handle intimate gatherings to lavish weddings, providing a royal touch to events.

name: Snow Building

It features a private outdoor patio for cocktail hours or networking, along with exceptional catering from SSA Group using locally sourced ingredients. This blend of natural charm and modern amenities ensures a seamless and memorable wedding experience.

name: Spreafico Farms
description: Spreafico Farms is a rustic farm-style wedding venue in San Luis Obispo, California, situated on a family-owned cattle and vegetable ranch with panoramic 360-degree views where vineyards meet the city and farms. The Terrace Lawn between the event center and rolling hills hosts up to 500. Full-service experience with award-winning in-house catering, wine pairings, dedicated events team, and day-of coordination by Catering Sales Manager Dominique Garcia. Peak season March–October.

It accommodates weddings from intimate gatherings to large events for up to 376 guests, with on-site catering, bar services, and professional AV equipment. Couples appreciate its elegant design and experienced staff for creating timeless, memorable weddings.

It features a private, sheltered outdoor space with misters, heaters, and sound systems, making it ideal for affordable luxury weddings and special occasions. With over 11 years of experience and a 5-star rating, it welcomes all couples for personalized celebrations.

The venue offers luxurious amenities like a chef’s kitchen, five bedrooms, and gated privacy to ensure a personalized and stress-free celebration. name: Marina Resort Hotel - Weddings & Special Events
Mountain Home Ranch

description: Friendly Wedding Chapel in Modesto, CA, is a dedicated wedding venue offering intimate ceremonies with a romantic atmosphere, located at 1225 Tully Rd. It offers amenities like a bridal staging area, polished cement floors, exposed wooden beams, and access to decor and vintage furniture. The venue accommodates up to 130 guests and includes an onsite manager for coordination.

It accommodates up to 150 guests in a tranquil environment without vehicular access, making it ideal for intimate celebrations with stunning natural backdrops for photography. name: The Top of the Hub
description: At The Top of the Hub, we provide an enchanting setting for your special day, where love and celebration unite. Our wedding venue boasts timeless elegance, versatile spaces, and modern amenities. Choose us for a wedding that reflects your unique love story.
